cards.name: Ancalon
cards.description: An encounter with an ancient dragon can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
By the time they realized the heat in the air was not the sun, the great shape had already claimed sky, stone, and courage alike.

Fire, treasure, and old malice all seemed near at hand, and every step felt as though it had brought him into the memory of some elder ruin.

What should they do now? Should they stand against the wyrm, slip clear of its wrath, or trust to words before the jaws close?

encounterOptions.label: Stand Beneath The Black Wing
encounterOptions.description: Face the world-shaking wyrm with all the strength you can gather before fire and shadow erase the field itself.

outcomes.resultText: Against apocalyptic fury, you seize a victory fit for songs of the elder world and wrench treasure from the edge of annihilation.
Even in survival, Ancalon's passing scorches body and soul with a terror vast enough to darken every later memory.

encounterOptions.label: Vanish Beneath Doom
encounterOptions.description: Use perfect timing and a hero's nerve to slip where such colossal destruction is least likely to fall.

outcomes.resultText: You pass beneath the ruin of Ancalon's shadow before the great dragon can turn its full wrath upon you.
Though you escape direct destruction, the sheer devastation of Ancalon's passage leaves you stumbling and delayed.

encounterOptions.label: Cry Up To Cataclysm
encounterOptions.description: Attempt the impossible and speak to the black doom as though pride, darkness, or tribute might stay it for a breath.

outcomes.resultText: Something in your darkness or daring satisfies the ancient terror for a fleeting moment, and you are spared beneath a passing judgment.
Your words are nothing against so vast a doom. What remains is only terror on a scale few minds can endure.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run while the black ruin still spends itself elsewhere and before the sky falls entirely upon you.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Ancalon, but only after the nearness of utter ruin has shattered the order of your retreat.

cards.name: Apprentice Of Pallando
cards.description: An encounter with a wandering wizard can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
At the edge of twilight they found a figure who seemed less like a traveler than a keeper of meanings half-hidden from ordinary folk.

The air around the meeting felt full of counsel, judgment, and the sense that what was spoken here might matter long afterward.

What should they do now? Should they ask for aid, prove worthy of deeper counsel, or watch for the lesson behind the silence?

encounterOptions.label: Ask For A Star-Sign
encounterOptions.description: Open your need before the eastern apprentice and ask what guidance the wandering heavens have marked for your road.

outcomes.resultText: The Apprentice Of Pallando traces a sign in the air and names a road beneath luckier stars. Your heart lifts, and your steps quicken beneath the blessing.
He studies you, then lets the omen die unspoken. You leave with more unease than guidance, as though some warning was withheld.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Beneath His Gaze
encounterOptions.description: Offer your name, your purpose, and your resolve without flinching, and let him judge whether you are fit to hear more.

outcomes.resultText: The Apprentice Of Pallando finds no weakness in your bearing. With a grave nod he yields a rare word of approval, and it steels you like a hidden charm.
He sees through the posture at once and answers with a cutting truth. Pride stings worse than the road, and you leave diminished by it.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Wandering Signs
encounterOptions.description: Study his staff, his half-spoken cautions, and the pattern of his stillness until the lesson hidden in the meeting begins to reveal itself.

outcomes.resultText: In the tilt of his head and the old star-lore he mutters under his breath, you catch a fragment of deeper wisdom. What first seemed wandering turns suddenly into pattern.
The signs crowd too close and resolve into nothing. You come away troubled by hints that never became understanding.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Leave the meeting unfinished before eastern counsel can bind your road.

outcomes.resultText: You move on before the eastern apprentice can lay omen or obligation upon your path.

cards.name: Barliman Butterbur
cards.description: An encounter with a kindly innkeeper can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Warm light, plain speech, and watchful eyes met him before any formal greeting did, and the place felt safer than the roads outside without ever becoming careless.

Here comfort and good sense lived side by side, and one had the feeling that much could be learned if approached the right way.

What should they do now? Should they accept the welcome, listen for what the household knows, or push the meeting too far?

encounterOptions.label: Take The Innfire's Grace
encounterOptions.description: Set aside watchfulness for a little while and accept bread, ale, and the shelter of his well-kept house.

outcomes.resultText: Barliman presses a warm meal upon you and sees to your comfort with honest care. For a little while the world grows smaller, kinder, and easier to bear.
Though the table is laid, no ease comes to you beneath that roof. Every laugh sounds guarded, and you leave restless, unable to shake your unease.

encounterOptions.label: Listen Where The Ale Flows
encounterOptions.description: Keep your cup low and your ears open until the inn begins to yield the road's hidden traffic.

outcomes.resultText: Between worried glances and half-finished tales, Barliman lets fall the one scrap of news that truly matters. You leave the inn richer in more than coin.
You chase whispers until dawn and find only muddled tales, old fears, and wasted hours. The road leaves you no kinder for the delay.

encounterOptions.label: Lean Too Hard On The Host
encounterOptions.description: Try to wring more from him than goodwill freely grants, and see how far courtesy will bend before it breaks.

outcomes.resultText: Barliman recoils at once, and the common room falls silent around you. What warmth remained in the inn is lost beneath the shame of your own heavy hand.
The innkeeper's face hardens behind forced politeness, and whatever useful thing might have been said is barred against you.

fleeOption.label: Pass By The Prancing Pony
fleeOption.description: Refuse the inn's shelter and keep moving before comfort can delay you.

outcomes.resultText: You leave the lights of Bree behind and keep to the darkened road, carrying none of the warmth that might have been yours.

cards.name: Barrow Wight
cards.description: An encounter with a grave-bound horror can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The cold in that place did not belong to weather, but to old earth, shut stones, and names that had not rested properly.

When the thing before him stirred, the dread came with it, and suddenly the grave no longer felt far below but terribly near.

What should they do now? Should they strike first, slip from the dead things reach, or risk words with what should have remained silent?

encounterOptions.label: Break The Grave-Spell
encounterOptions.description: Charge the wight before its cold sorcery can sink fully into your limbs and will.

outcomes.resultText: Steel, fire, or sheer force of will tears through the grave-spell, and the barrow's clutch loosens long enough for you to wrench some hard prize from the dead place.
Though you tear free at last, the tomb-cold of the wight sinks deep into flesh and spirit before it releases you.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Haunted Mound
encounterOptions.description: Move with desperate care through fog, hollow ground, and grasping shadow before the dead thing fixes wholly upon you.

outcomes.resultText: You pass the haunted threshold by inches, denying the wight any true hold on you before the mist closes behind your escape.
The wight's chill follows you out of the mound and leaves your limbs heavy as if grave-earth still clung to them.

encounterOptions.label: Name Yourself To The Dead
encounterOptions.description: Offer words into the ancient dark and see whether dread, cunning, or darker kinship can stay its hand.

outcomes.resultText: Something in your bearing, voice, or allegiance stills the wight's hunger for a moment, and the grave's malice lets you pass unseized.
Your words vanish into sepulchral hunger, and the wight answers only with a colder dread than speech can master.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Turn and flee before the tomb-dark seals itself around your name and heartbeat.

outcomes.resultText: You tear yourself free of the barrow's reach, but the horror of that escape leaves your pace broken and your courage thinned.

cards.name: Barrow Wights
cards.description: An encounter with restless dead can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The cold in that place did not belong to weather, but to old earth, shut stones, and names that had not rested properly.

When the thing before him stirred, the dread came with it, and suddenly the grave no longer felt far below but terribly near.

What should they do now? Should they strike first, slip from the dead things reach, or risk words with what should have remained silent?

encounterOptions.label: Hack Through The Dead Ring
encounterOptions.description: Break their encirclement with violence before the barrows tighten shut like a trap of cold earth and memory.

outcomes.resultText: You smash a path through the dead ring and wrench your spoils from a place where no living hand was meant to profit.
Though you escape the ring of graves, the touch of many dead things clings to you long after the mounds are behind.

encounterOptions.label: Thread The Mournful Stones
encounterOptions.description: Pick your path through mist, toppled markers, and half-seen watchers before the dead can close around you as one.

outcomes.resultText: You ghost between mound and marker just ahead of the gathering dead, escaping before their cold attention can join upon you.
The downs seem to hold your feet as you withdraw, and every backward glance costs you more precious ground.

encounterOptions.label: Whisper Into The Barrows
encounterOptions.description: Try words, signs, or darker affinities against a host of dead wills that have forgotten all mercy.

outcomes.resultText: For one strained instant, the dead host mistakes you for something not worth claiming, and the path opens just wide enough to escape.
The whispering graves heed nothing living. Their answer is a dread that rises from every side at once.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Flee the barrows before the dead close every path and make the downs your tomb as well.

outcomes.resultText: You break from the barrows in ragged haste, but the dead country keeps enough of your strength to slow you badly.

cards.name: Beast Friend
cards.description: An encounter with a woodland sage can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Before they fully saw it, they felt the living danger of it: hunger, motion, and the sense that the ground itself had tilted toward tooth, sting, fang, or coil.

Whatever stood before him belonged more to instinct than mercy, and yet it carried its own dreadful kind of purpose.

What should they do now? Should they meet the creature by force, evade its reach, or try some desperate answer before it closes in?

encounterOptions.label: Ask The Kindly Wild
encounterOptions.description: Appeal to the beast-friend for shelter, heartening, and the small living aids that gather around him.

outcomes.resultText: Beast Friend answers with a warmth that needs no ceremony. Creatures draw near, fear lifts, and the road ahead feels lighter beneath the fellowship of the living wood.
The wild things nearest him do not come close to you, and his kindness remains at a distance. You leave with the uneasy feeling that nature itself withheld its trust.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Quiet Among The Creatures
encounterOptions.description: Hold yourself still and true until the beasts around him decide whether you belong among them.

outcomes.resultText: You stand without threat or greed, and the creatures about Beast Friend accept you. In that rough and wordless blessing, your heart grows stronger.
Something restless in you startles the peace of the place. The beasts recoil, and the rebuke of that rejection lands harder than any spoken scorn.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Small Signs
encounterOptions.description: Study the animals, the hush, and the little movements of trust and warning around him.

outcomes.resultText: In the twitch of ears, the settling of birds, and the calm around Beast Friend, you learn a gentler lore than books teach. The lesson sharpens your sense for what lives and stirs unseen.
You miss the pattern in the small signs and come away only with a vague unease, as though every creature knew something you did not.

fleeOption.label: Leave The Creatures Undisturbed
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before the peace of the place is broken by your presence.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Beast Friend and his gathered creatures behind, but the quiet innocence of the meeting slows your stride with regret.

cards.name: Beast Master Of Morannon
cards.description: An encounter with a dark beast-master can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Before they fully saw it, they felt the living danger of it: hunger, motion, and the sense that the ground itself had tilted toward tooth, sting, fang, or coil.

Whatever stood before him belonged more to instinct than mercy, and yet it carried its own dreadful kind of purpose.

What should they do now? Should they meet the creature by force, evade its reach, or try some desperate answer before it closes in?

encounterOptions.label: Break The Lash And Fang
encounterOptions.description: Throw yourself at master and beasts together before command and bloodlust can fully close around you.

outcomes.resultText: With steel and desperation you break the line of lash and fang, and in the chaos seize something worth the blood it cost.
Even in escaping, you are mauled by the pack and haunted by the handler's triumphant cruelty.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Hunting Pack
encounterOptions.description: Rely on shadow, broken ground, and perfect timing to deny hound and handler a clean pursuit.

outcomes.resultText: You vanish between the beast-master's signals and the snapping rush of the pack, escaping before their hunt can truly fix upon you.
You escape the teeth, but the relentless pressure of the chase tears all speed and order from your retreat.

encounterOptions.label: Speak In The Black Gate's Manner
encounterOptions.description: Try command, threat, or dark familiarity and see whether the beast-master hears enough kinship to stay the hunt.

outcomes.resultText: The beast-master reads enough darkness in your speech to draw back his pack, and you are granted a narrow, snarling passage onward.
Your words fail beneath whip-crack and growl, and the pack's answering malice chills the blood before it even strikes.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run while the pack's line is still imperfect and before the lash turns your retreat into a hunt.

outcomes.resultText: You break from the hunt at last, but the terror of teeth at your back leaves you scattered and slow.

cards.name: Bees
cards.description: An encounter with a furious swarm can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Before they fully saw it, they felt the living danger of it: hunger, motion, and the sense that the ground itself had tilted toward tooth, sting, fang, or coil.

Whatever stood before him belonged more to instinct than mercy, and yet it carried its own dreadful kind of purpose.

What should they do now? Should they meet the creature by force, evade its reach, or try some desperate answer before it closes in?

encounterOptions.label: Rush The Swarm
encounterOptions.description: Force your way through the living cloud before fear and stings drive you wholly from your purpose.

outcomes.resultText: You burst through the swarm in a frenzy of motion and pain, gaining your ground at a cost that still somehow leaves profit in your grasp.
You escape the swarm only after it has marked flesh and nerve with a sharp, lingering misery.

encounterOptions.label: Veer With The Cloud
encounterOptions.description: Read the shifting hum and slip where the swarm thins before it folds back upon you.

outcomes.resultText: By quick instinct and quicker feet, you catch the one opening in the living cloud and vanish before it can fold shut.
Though you avoid the worst of the swarm, its fury drives you off-course and robs your retreat of speed.

encounterOptions.label: Still The Maddened Air
encounterOptions.description: Try smoke, murmured craft, or dark command against a rage that may heed nothing but its own wild motion.

outcomes.resultText: By strange craft or harsher will, you blunt the swarm's fury just long enough to pass beyond its reach.
The swarm knows no bargain. Its only answer is a rising hum that turns the heart frantic.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Throw yourself clear before the swarm gathers into a full black fury around you.

outcomes.resultText: You outrun the swarm at last, but not before its maddening hum scatters your pace and nerve.

cards.name: Black Rider
cards.description: An encounter with a hooded rider can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
A chill of command walked before the figure, and by the time they stood face to face with it the world already felt narrower, harsher, and less forgiving.

Here was power shaped by fear, discipline, and long intention, the sort that rarely offers anything without claiming something in return.

What should they do now? Should they confront the menace outright, evade the will pressing upon him, or answer in the language of rank, threat, or shadow?

encounterOptions.label: Defy The Nazgul
encounterOptions.description: Strike before the Rider's terror fully masters your limbs and leaves you helpless beneath its shadow.

outcomes.resultText: Against every instinct of fear, you force the Black Rider back and win a grim advantage from the clash.
You escape the Rider's immediate reach, but its shadow enters your blood and leaves a wound deeper than flesh alone.

encounterOptions.label: Slip Beyond The Fell Scent
encounterOptions.description: Trust in stealth, broken sightlines, and desperate timing before the Rider fixes wholly on your trail.

outcomes.resultText: You vanish from the Black Rider's immediate grasp just before its hunt narrows to certainty, and the escape lends speed to your every step.
Though you evade the worst of its pursuit, the Rider's nearness drains all swiftness from your retreat.

encounterOptions.label: Answer The Shadow's Demand
encounterOptions.description: Try submission, deceit, or the manners of darker service and see whether the Rider lets you pass beneath its notice.

outcomes.resultText: Something in your speech or allegiance satisfies the Black Rider for a moment, and it passes on with only a lingering dread in its wake.
No plea or deception truly reaches what remains beneath the hood. The only answer is mounting terror.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break from the encounter before the Rider's will settles over you like a chain.

outcomes.resultText: You flee the Black Rider's presence, but the dread of that escape leaves you slow, shaken, and looking over your shoulder.

cards.name: Commander Of The Galadhrim
cards.description: An encounter with an elven captain can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Call The Hidden Host
encounterOptions.description: Ask the lord-commander to set the guarded strength of the Galadhrim behind your purpose.

outcomes.resultText: Commander Of The Galadhrim gives his answer like a lord long obeyed. At once the guarded strength of the Golden Wood turns toward your cause, and your road is made swifter beneath silent protection.
He hears you in stillness and gives only the reserve due one not yet proven. You depart with the chill of having stood before old wisdom and found no welcome in it.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Before The Lord Of The Wood
encounterOptions.description: Hold fast beneath his grave regard and prove you are equal to the burdens he has carried through long war.

outcomes.resultText: You do not bend beneath the old authority in him. At last Commander Of The Galadhrim grants a rare sign of respect, and it settles on you like a cloak woven for war and endurance.
His ancient composure unmakes your boldness. Before that lordly command your strength fails, and the shame of it leaves a wound behind.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Deep Strategy
encounterOptions.description: Watch his silences, his warriors, and the forest's ordered stillness until the design beneath it all begins to reveal itself.

outcomes.resultText: At last you glimpse the depth of the command before you: patience married to foresight, vigilance to memory, and war-craft to restraint. The insight sharpens you at once.
His silence proves too deep to sound. You leave more burdened than enlightened, as though every tree in the Golden Wood had measured you and withheld its trust.

fleeOption.label: Withdraw From The Golden Guard
fleeOption.description: Leave before the lord-commander's judgment settles more heavily upon you.

outcomes.resultText: You withdraw from Commander Of The Galadhrim, yet long afterward you feel the weight of disciplined eyes in every green shadow along your road.

cards.name: Dawndeath
cards.description: An encounter with a shadowed sorcerer can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
A chill of command walked before the figure, and by the time they stood face to face with it the world already felt narrower, harsher, and less forgiving.

Here was power shaped by fear, discipline, and long intention, the sort that rarely offers anything without claiming something in return.

What should they do now? Should they confront the menace outright, evade the will pressing upon him, or answer in the language of rank, threat, or shadow?

encounterOptions.label: Shatter The False Dawn
encounterOptions.description: Strike before Ji Indur's sorcery and will can settle over the field like a rising curse.

outcomes.resultText: You break the dark glamour of Dawndeath and wrench profit from a victory won against sorcery and command alike.
Though you survive, the sorcerer's touch leaves fear and pain lingering like a stain of failed dawn.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Eastern Hex
encounterOptions.description: Move before Ji Indur's patient design can close around you and make escape a matter of his choosing instead of yours.

outcomes.resultText: You evade Dawndeath's prepared malice and pass beyond his strongest working before it can fully seize you.
Though you escape the sorcerer's full claim, the weight of his spellcraft clings to your retreat and robs it of pace.

encounterOptions.label: Trade Power With Dawndeath
encounterOptions.description: Answer his dark statecraft with submission, intrigue, or darker usefulness and see whether he finds cause to spare you.

outcomes.resultText: Dawndeath hears enough ambition or service in your answer to let the meeting end without immediate ruin.
Your words fail against Ji Indur's cold self-assurance, and all that remains is the dread of having drawn his full attention.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break from the encounter before Dawndeath's rising malice hardens into a binding fate.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Dawndeath, but only after his shadowed will has slowed and shaken your retreat.

cards.name: Desert Serpent
cards.description: An encounter with a desert serpent can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Before they fully saw it, they felt the living danger of it: hunger, motion, and the sense that the ground itself had tilted toward tooth, sting, fang, or coil.

Whatever stood before him belonged more to instinct than mercy, and yet it carried its own dreadful kind of purpose.

What should they do now? Should they meet the creature by force, evade its reach, or try some desperate answer before it closes in?

encounterOptions.label: Break The Coil
encounterOptions.description: Strike the serpent before the desert gives it the one heartbeat more it needs to own the ground around you.

outcomes.resultText: You break the serpent's killing coil and seize a hard-earned gain from the edge of a venomous death.
Though you escape, venom, sand, and terror leave their mark on you before the serpent yields.

encounterOptions.label: Ghost Across The Hot Sand
encounterOptions.description: Use speed and flawless timing to pass before the serpent's strike finds the heat of your body.

outcomes.resultText: You pass the serpent's hidden strike and leave it hissing at an empty patch of burning sand.
You escape the strike, but the harsh ground and the near-miss leave your retreat ragged and slow.

encounterOptions.label: Soothe The Venom-Spirit
encounterOptions.description: Try darker will, strange beast-craft, or sheer nerve against a thing that may heed only hunger and command.

outcomes.resultText: By dark craft or iron nerve, you still the serpent's killing instant and win a narrow passage beyond its claim.
The serpent knows no bargain you can offer, and fear comes over you as swiftly as its shadow.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run before sand, heat, and venom all choose the same moment to destroy you.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Desert Serpent, but only after the wasteland itself has helped break your pace and nerve.

cards.name: Disturber Of The Peace
cards.description: An encounter with an unsettling wanderer can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The stranger did not seem accidental, and that alone was enough to make the meeting feel dangerous.

There was secrecy in the posture, history in the eyes, and the unsettling sense that this crossing of paths might be far more important than either road suggested.

What should they do now? Should they trust the wanderer, watch for what is concealed, or seize what advantage the moment offers?

encounterOptions.label: Share Pipe-Smoke And Counsel
encounterOptions.description: Sit with the troublesome wanderer awhile and accept what warmth, wit, and wary counsel he chooses to offer.

outcomes.resultText: The Disturber Of The Peace gives rest without softness, and by the end of it your spirits are steadier for the very trouble he has stirred.
You find no comfort in his company. Every word feels like a hidden test, and you leave more troubled than restored.

encounterOptions.label: Catch The Rumor In His Wake
encounterOptions.description: Listen for the names, warnings, and half-laughed truths that follow in the wake of his passing.

outcomes.resultText: Between jest and rebuke, the Disturber Of The Peace lets fall exactly the warning or opportunity you needed to hear.
His words circle higher matters than you can seize, and you are left with only unease and lost time.

encounterOptions.label: Challenge The Wanderer
encounterOptions.description: Press him harder than courtesy permits and see whether impatience can win what trust has not.

outcomes.resultText: His look hardens in an instant, and the sharpness of his displeasure drains all warmth from the meeting.
He gives you nothing beyond a few cutting words, and whatever wisdom might have been yours is shut away.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Leave before the troublesome traveler can overturn the shape of your thoughts any further.

outcomes.resultText: You move on untouched in body, though with the uneasy sense that you may have walked away from needed warning.

cards.name: Durins Bane
cards.description: An encounter with a fire-demon can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
A chill of command walked before the figure, and by the time they stood face to face with it the world already felt narrower, harsher, and less forgiving.

Here was power shaped by fear, discipline, and long intention, the sort that rarely offers anything without claiming something in return.

What should they do now? Should they confront the menace outright, evade the will pressing upon him, or answer in the language of rank, threat, or shadow?

encounterOptions.label: Stand Before Flame And Shadow
encounterOptions.description: Hurl everything you have against the demon before its ancient wrath makes the very world too hostile to stand upon.

outcomes.resultText: Against a terror from the elder dark, you somehow force a path through and win reward worthy of legend.
Even in survival, the Balrog's fire and shadow brand you with pain and horror almost beyond bearing.

encounterOptions.label: Pass Beneath The Whip Of Fire
encounterOptions.description: Move with perfect desperation before the ancient demon can bring its full ruin to bear upon you.

outcomes.resultText: You evade the Balrog's direct wrath and pass beyond the worst of its doom by a margin no one would call safe.
Though you escape destruction, the demon's presence shatters the order of your retreat and leaves you badly checked.

encounterOptions.label: Address The Ancient Fire
encounterOptions.description: Use dark command, submission, or perilous kinship and see whether the elder terror grants you a single spared moment.

outcomes.resultText: Some dark sign or allegiance stays the ancient fire just long enough for you to pass beyond its immediate wrath.
Your words are as nothing to the Balrog, and fear crashes over you like furnace-heat made into will.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run before flame, shadow, and doom close so tightly that flight itself becomes impossible.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Durin's Bane, but only after its sheer terror has broken your retreat into a staggered ruin.

cards.name: Eagle King
cards.description: An encounter with a lord of the eagles can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The place and the meeting alike carried the feeling that ordinary rules had already thinned or slipped aside.

What stood before him was not easily measured, and the mind kept reaching for familiar explanations only to find that none of them quite held.

What should they do now? Should they press forward into the wonder, move carefully around the peril, or search for the meaning hidden inside the strangeness?

encounterOptions.label: Hail The Lord Of The Heights
encounterOptions.description: Meet the great eagle with the honor due one who serves no master beneath the sky.

outcomes.resultText: Eagle King answers your greeting with a piercing cry and the fierce acceptance of the free airs. In that terrible favor, your heart lifts as though it too had taken wing.
He regards you with a hard, bright eye and offers no sign of friendship. Beneath that vast indifference, your courage grows thinner.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Wind-Signs
encounterOptions.description: Watch his wings, his cry, and the mountain-weather gathered about him for the message hidden in his coming.

outcomes.resultText: In the beat of his wings and the sharpness of the air around him, you catch a higher warning than words could carry. The insight comes swift and clean as mountain sunlight.
The signs of the heights are too swift and strange for you. The meeting leaves you reeling beneath a majesty you could not understand.

encounterOptions.label: Clutch A Feathered Fortune
encounterOptions.description: Try to profit from the great eagle's passing before he vanishes again into the upper airs.

outcomes.resultText: By rare daring you win a small boon from the passing of Eagle King, like treasure torn from the very rush of the high wind.
You grasp too boldly at what was never yours to claim, and the rebuke of those mighty wings leaves pain in its wake.

fleeOption.label: Duck Beneath The Shadow
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before the king of eagles fixes more of his terrible attention upon you.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Eagle King behind, yet the memory of his descending shadow lingers over your road like a judgment from the heights.

cards.name: Eldest And Fatherless
cards.description: An encounter with an ancient enigma can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The place and the meeting alike carried the feeling that ordinary rules had already thinned or slipped aside.

What stood before him was not easily measured, and the mind kept reaching for familiar explanations only to find that none of them quite held.

What should they do now? Should they press forward into the wonder, move carefully around the peril, or search for the meaning hidden inside the strangeness?

encounterOptions.label: Answer The Merry Call
encounterOptions.description: Step into his laughter and trust that no malice hides in the old delight of his welcome.

outcomes.resultText: Eldest And Fatherless greets you as though you had always belonged to the day and the song. In that impossible welcome, your heart grows unexpectedly light.
He laughs and sings, but the sense of him slips through your grasp like water through open hands.

encounterOptions.label: Listen Beyond The Nonsense
encounterOptions.description: Attend to his songs, riddles, and bright absurdities until some deeper truth begins to shine through.

outcomes.resultText: At last you catch the deeper current beneath the laughter: a wisdom older than care and a freedom no shadow has ever mastered.
His songs run too deep and too strangely for you to follow, and the joy in them only makes your confusion sharper.

encounterOptions.label: Grasp At The Timeless
encounterOptions.description: Try to draw some gift, secret, or practical advantage from one who stands outside ordinary bargains.

outcomes.resultText: By rare fortune you come away with a small boon from the meeting, as if the old joy of the world had spilled a single coin into your hand.
You reach for what cannot be owned, and the old power before you slips aside laughing while your grasp closes on pain.

fleeOption.label: Leave The Song Unfinished
fleeOption.description: Step away before the strange mirth and older power of the place can draw you any deeper.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Eldest And Fatherless behind, but the echo of his laughter follows you like a memory from before memory.

cards.name: Emissary From Mordor
cards.description: An encounter with a dark envoy can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
A chill of command walked before the figure, and by the time they stood face to face with it the world already felt narrower, harsher, and less forgiving.

Here was power shaped by fear, discipline, and long intention, the sort that rarely offers anything without claiming something in return.

What should they do now? Should they confront the menace outright, evade the will pressing upon him, or answer in the language of rank, threat, or shadow?

encounterOptions.label: Break The Black Mandate
encounterOptions.description: Strike before the envoy's authority and escort can settle over the field like a sentence already passed.

outcomes.resultText: You shatter the emissary's grim authority and wrench a harsh profit from the ruin of his mission.
Even in escape, the Emissary From Mordor leaves behind a wound of fear and violence that lingers like a brand.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Dark Dispatch
encounterOptions.description: Deny the envoy a fixed target and vanish before his mission can close its full net around you.

outcomes.resultText: You pass outside the reach of the dark dispatch, leaving the emissary with no certain trail to lay hold of.
Though you escape his grasp, the pressure of Mordor's will breaks your pace and darkens your withdrawal.

encounterOptions.label: Answer In The Shadow's Tongue
encounterOptions.description: Use menace, submission, or black diplomacy and see whether the envoy will mistake you for one who may pass unharmed.

outcomes.resultText: The emissary hears enough kinship or usefulness in your answer to stay his hand, and you are waved onward beneath dark sufferance.
Your words vanish against the iron purpose of Mordor, and what remains is only the dread of being weighed and found vulnerable.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break from the encounter before the black mission can fully close upon you.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Emissary From Mordor, but only after its cold authority has stripped speed and steadiness from your retreat.

cards.name: Emissary Of Rhun
cards.description: An encounter with an eastern envoy can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
A chill of command walked before the figure, and by the time they stood face to face with it the world already felt narrower, harsher, and less forgiving.

Here was power shaped by fear, discipline, and long intention, the sort that rarely offers anything without claiming something in return.

What should they do now? Should they confront the menace outright, evade the will pressing upon him, or answer in the language of rank, threat, or shadow?

encounterOptions.label: Shatter The Eastern Embassy
encounterOptions.description: Cut through ceremonial grace and hidden knives together before the emissary can bind the field to his advantage.

outcomes.resultText: You tear through the eastern envoy's guard and ceremony alike, seizing hard reward from a meeting that was meant to ensnare you.
Even driven back, the emissary leaves you stung by steel, intrigue, and the fear that you have not escaped his designs entire.

encounterOptions.label: Pass Beyond Silk And Snares
encounterOptions.description: Move before courtesy becomes entanglement and slip the eastern envoy's designs before they settle on you.

outcomes.resultText: You pass between the emissary's courtesies and hidden dangers before either can take true hold of you.
Though you escape the envoy's full net, the evasions cost you precious ground and composure.

encounterOptions.label: Trade Words Of East And Shadow
encounterOptions.description: Answer intrigue with intrigue and see whether ambition, deceit, or dark allegiance can win safe passage.

outcomes.resultText: The emissary finds your answer sufficiently useful, dangerous, or familiar, and allows the meeting to end without open bloodshed.
Your words are weighed, smiled at, and dismissed. What remains is the cold fear of having shown too much to a subtle enemy.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before eastern courtesy becomes a chain too fine to notice until it is tight.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Emissary Of Rhun, but the careful pressure of that encounter leaves your steps slowed and your thoughts unsettled.

cards.name: Farmer Cotton
cards.description: An encounter with a country farmer can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Warm light, plain speech, and watchful eyes met him before any formal greeting did, and the place felt safer than the roads outside without ever becoming careless.

Here comfort and good sense lived side by side, and one had the feeling that much could be learned if approached the right way.

What should they do now? Should they accept the welcome, listen for what the household knows, or push the meeting too far?

encounterOptions.label: Share Bread At The Farm
encounterOptions.description: Accept the plain welcome of hearth, table, and a farmer's honest kindness.

outcomes.resultText: Farmer Cotton gives you a place by the hearth and sets good food before you without fuss or fear. The sturdy peace of the Shire mends more in you than hunger alone.
You are received, but never welcomed. The farm's watchful quiet presses on you until even a kindly table feels like a warning.

encounterOptions.label: Hear What Runs Through The Furrows
encounterOptions.description: Listen to the talk of lanes, hedges, and field-gates where danger is named long before it becomes a tale.

outcomes.resultText: From talk of wagons, strangers, and late lamps in distant holes, Farmer Cotton gives you a scrap of useful truth worth carrying onward.
The talk drifts into weather, harvest, and names that lead nowhere. By the time you part, the day has slipped from you to no profit.

encounterOptions.label: Try The Farmer's Patience
encounterOptions.description: Push too hard for what he does not care to tell and learn how much iron hides inside plain speech.

outcomes.resultText: Farmer Cotton's look hardens like a barred gate, and the farm closes itself against you. Even the air around the yard seems to judge your manner.
He answers no more than courtesy demands, and every useful word is shut away behind the firmness of his silence.

fleeOption.label: Leave The Gate Untroubled
fleeOption.description: Pass the farm by and keep to your business before roots and kindness can delay you.

outcomes.resultText: You move on without troubling the homestead, though some small steadiness of the Shire is lost to you by that choice.

cards.name: Farmer Maggot
cards.description: An encounter with a wary farmer can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Warm light, plain speech, and watchful eyes met him before any formal greeting did, and the place felt safer than the roads outside without ever becoming careless.

Here comfort and good sense lived side by side, and one had the feeling that much could be learned if approached the right way.

What should they do now? Should they accept the welcome, listen for what the household knows, or push the meeting too far?

encounterOptions.label: Sit At Maggot's Table
encounterOptions.description: Accept the rough but honest welcome of a house where plain food and plain truths are given together.

outcomes.resultText: Farmer Maggot feeds you well and speaks with the blunt kindness of one who fears little. In his house, honest strength proves more healing than luxury ever could.
The meal is set before you, yet the old farmer's wary stare never leaves your face. You leave with your nerves more frayed than when you arrived.

encounterOptions.label: Hear Of Tracks And Trespassers
encounterOptions.description: Listen for what he has seen near hedge, ditch, and lane where unwelcome things leave their mark.

outcomes.resultText: Maggot tells you of tracks, strangers, and black unease moving where it ought not. The knowledge is plain, sharp, and worth more than silver.
You listen long, but the trail of talk scatters into nothing certain. The lost time dogs your steps when you set out again.

encounterOptions.label: Cross The Farmer
encounterOptions.description: Push beyond caution and courtesy, and test how swiftly the old hobbit's temper can turn hard.

outcomes.resultText: Farmer Maggot rises in anger, and the whole house seems suddenly to take his side. You are cast under a disfavor that bites deeper than any shouted rebuke.
He shuts his mouth like a bolted door, and not another useful word is won from him.

fleeOption.label: Keep Clear Of The Ditches
fleeOption.description: Leave his lands behind before questions, dogs, or old grudges can catch your heels.

outcomes.resultText: You pass on without stopping, but the chance to gain a stout ally of the lanes is left behind with the turning of the road.

cards.name: Fell Rider
cards.description: An encounter with a fell rider can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
A chill of command walked before the figure, and by the time they stood face to face with it the world already felt narrower, harsher, and less forgiving.

Here was power shaped by fear, discipline, and long intention, the sort that rarely offers anything without claiming something in return.

What should they do now? Should they confront the menace outright, evade the will pressing upon him, or answer in the language of rank, threat, or shadow?

encounterOptions.label: Defy The Winged Hunt
encounterOptions.description: Strike before the rider's aerial terror and the beast's descending fury own the whole field.

outcomes.resultText: You survive the fell descent and wrench grim advantage from a clash few would choose willingly.
Though you escape, the scream of the beast and the rider's shadow leave deep wounds of fear and flesh.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Shadowing Wings
encounterOptions.description: Use cover, speed, and desperate timing before the winged Nazgul fixes your death from above.

outcomes.resultText: You pass beneath the fell rider's killing line before the shadow overhead can close fully upon you.
The winged hunt does not take you, but it hounds your retreat into a frightened, broken pace.

encounterOptions.label: Answer The Rider Of Dread
encounterOptions.description: Use submission, deceit, or darker kinship and see whether the winged servant of Shadow will let you pass beneath notice.

outcomes.resultText: The fell rider senses enough darkness or usefulness in you to spare you the full hunt for now.
No mortal answer turns the rider's will, and dread crashes over you before the beast even strikes.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run before the winged terror circles once more and seals your fate from above.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Fell Rider, but only after sky-borne terror has stripped steadiness from your retreat.

cards.name: Giants
cards.description: An encounter with mountain giants can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The place and the meeting alike carried the feeling that ordinary rules had already thinned or slipped aside.

What stood before him was not easily measured, and the mind kept reaching for familiar explanations only to find that none of them quite held.

What should they do now? Should they press forward into the wonder, move carefully around the peril, or search for the meaning hidden inside the strangeness?

encounterOptions.label: Dare The Stone-Fists
encounterOptions.description: Face the mountain-born brutes in open struggle before their sheer weight smashes the field around you flat.

outcomes.resultText: By desperate boldness and a refusal to be crushed, you carve out victory enough to seize something valuable from the ruin.
The giants do not catch you outright, but their terrible strength batters body and nerve before you wrench yourself free.

encounterOptions.label: Thread The Falling Stones
encounterOptions.description: Use speed and cunning to dart through the wreckage between their blows and keep out from under crushing hands.

outcomes.resultText: You race through toppled stone and staggering footsteps, escaping before the giants can bring their full ruin down on you.
Though you escape the worst of their reach, the shattered ground and raining stone break the pace of your retreat.

encounterOptions.label: Shout Into The Thunder
encounterOptions.description: Risk speech, bluff, or dark command and hope the mountain-brutes heed you for a heartbeat longer than they ought.

outcomes.resultText: By brute authority or stranger craft, you turn the giants' attention aside long enough to pass beneath their notice.
Your words are nothing to them but smaller thunder. Their answer is chaos and fear.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run while the giants' attention is elsewhere and before another boulder closes the path forever.

outcomes.resultText: You get clear of the giants at last, but only after shattered ground and panic have left you slow and disordered.

cards.name: Giant Scorpion
cards.description: An encounter with a giant scorpion can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Before they fully saw it, they felt the living danger of it: hunger, motion, and the sense that the ground itself had tilted toward tooth, sting, fang, or coil.

Whatever stood before him belonged more to instinct than mercy, and yet it carried its own dreadful kind of purpose.

What should they do now? Should they meet the creature by force, evade its reach, or try some desperate answer before it closes in?

encounterOptions.label: Crack The Venom-Shell
encounterOptions.description: Strike before claw and sting can pen you into the one deadly space the creature desires.

outcomes.resultText: You shatter the scorpion's killing advance and seize harsh reward from a creature built to yield none.
Though you survive, the sting of venom and the memory of near-enclosure follow you out of the fight.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Sting-Arc
encounterOptions.description: Move around claw and tail together before the scorpion can lock you into its fatal reach.

outcomes.resultText: You evade the sting's killing curve and pass beyond the creature's deadliest angle just in time.
You escape the giant scorpion, but only after its relentless pressure breaks your pace and nerve.

encounterOptions.label: Still The Poisoned Will
encounterOptions.description: Attempt darker command, beast-craft, or sheer dominance and see whether the venomous horror hesitates.

outcomes.resultText: By dark authority or stranger mastery, you still the giant scorpion long enough to win a narrow passage.
The creature answers no language you can trust, and fear rises as swiftly as its sting.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break away before claw, rock, and poison close into one perfect killing place.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Giant Scorpion, but only after its patient menace has left you slow and shaken.

cards.name: Glaurung
cards.description: An encounter with an ancient dragon can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
By the time they realized the heat in the air was not the sun, the great shape had already claimed sky, stone, and courage alike.

Fire, treasure, and old malice all seemed near at hand, and every step felt as though it had brought him into the memory of some elder ruin.

What should they do now? Should they stand against the wyrm, slip clear of its wrath, or trust to words before the jaws close?

encounterOptions.label: Defy The Father Of Dragons
encounterOptions.description: Strike before Glaurung's fire, will, and voice can master the field and your own courage together.

outcomes.resultText: You break through Glaurung's dreadful dominion and carry away a prize that seems itself astonished to have been won from him.
You escape the dragon's immediate wrath, but his fire and mind both leave wounds that burn long after the encounter.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Dragon's Hypnotic Eye
encounterOptions.description: Avoid not only fang and flame, but the terrible attention that would hold you fast before the kill.

outcomes.resultText: You evade Glaurung's full notice and pass beyond his deadliest advantage before his will can close over yours.
Though you get away, the dragon's nearness leaves your retreat heavy, shaken, and half-enchanted by dread.

encounterOptions.label: Answer The Worm's Mocking Speech
encounterOptions.description: Trade craft, lies, or dark allegiance with a dragon whose words can wound almost as deeply as his fire.

outcomes.resultText: Glaurung hears enough vanity, darkness, or promise in your answer to spare you for the moment and let you pass beneath his contempt.
Your words only deepen the dragon's scorn, and the dread of his gaze strikes harder than any argument could.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Flee before Glaurung's will settles so heavily upon you that neither foot nor thought remains your own.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Glaurung, but the force of his presence leaves your withdrawal broken and haunted.

cards.name: Goldberry
cards.description: An encounter with a river spirit can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Ask The River-Daughter's Grace
encounterOptions.description: Seek the blessing of the water-bright lady and the quickening peace she carries with her.

outcomes.resultText: Goldberry answers with laughter as clear as water over stone, and her grace falls on you like a fresh stream in drought. Heart and step alike grow lighter.
She gives you only a smile too bright and strange to fully hold. When you leave, you carry more longing than comfort from the meeting.

encounterOptions.label: Stand In The River-Light
encounterOptions.description: Remain open and untroubled before her clear regard, proving your spirit does not cloud before innocent power.

outcomes.resultText: You do not dim before her brightness, and Goldberry receives you with a joy that strengthens without ever feeling like command.
Her lightness exposes every heaviness you brought with you. What seemed strength in you dissolves, and you leave the meeting wounded by your own lesser heart.

encounterOptions.label: Listen To The Water-Speech
encounterOptions.description: Attend to her light words, the hush of the banks, and the moving brightness around her for deeper meaning.

outcomes.resultText: At last you hear in Goldberry's gentleness a wisdom that runs deeper than speech, like a stream carrying the memory of hills and rains. The insight refreshes and sharpens you together.
You listen only with the mind and miss what the water-heart in her was trying to tell you. The beauty of the meeting leaves you more unsettled than enlightened.

fleeOption.label: Leave The River-Blessing
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before her clear joy can work any more deeply on your heart.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Goldberry behind, but the memory of her bright peace follows you like a stream just out of sight.

cards.name: Gwaihir
cards.description: An encounter with a great eagle can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Cry To The Windlord
encounterOptions.description: Raise your need to the heights and ask whether the lord of eagles will stoop to bear your cause.

outcomes.resultText: Gwaihir hears you and answers with the swiftness of the upper wind. Under the shadow of his wings, dread falls back and your course quickens.
His golden eyes judge you and pass on. When he rises again, the empty sky he leaves behind feels colder than before.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Before The Talons
encounterOptions.description: Meet his terrible majesty without cowering and prove that your spirit can endure the gaze of the high airs.

outcomes.resultText: You do not bow beneath the thunder of his wings, and Gwaihir marks the courage in you. His fierce approval falls like sunlight after storm.
The force of his presence breaks your resolve more surely than steel. You stagger from the meeting as one struck by the sky itself.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Signs Of The Upper Air
encounterOptions.description: Study the angle of his flight, the urgency in his cry, and the burden of tidings borne from far horizons.

outcomes.resultText: You catch the warning folded within his flight and understand more than words alone could have told. The wind itself seems briefly to instruct you.
The signs vanish as quickly as they came, leaving you only with the ache of having missed some higher warning.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Let the great eagle pass and deny the sky any claim upon your path.

outcomes.resultText: You turn away before Gwaihir can descend again, yet for many miles you feel the emptiness of earthbound travel more keenly than before.

cards.name: Herald Of Gil Galad
cards.description: An encounter with an elven herald can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Receive The High King's Word
encounterOptions.description: Hear the message in full and ask whether the old authority of Lindon still extends its strength to your cause.

outcomes.resultText: The herald speaks in the name of lost splendor and undimmed duty. His words kindle courage and haste, as though a standard from the Last Alliance had been raised before you.
The message is given, but not for your comfort. You part beneath the weight of ancient expectation and the fear of failing it.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Beneath The Star-Banner
encounterOptions.description: Face the herald as one who would not shame the memory of the great war against the Shadow.

outcomes.resultText: You do not falter before the stern dignity of Lindon, and the herald inclines his head in hard-won respect. The honor of that moment steadies you like mail upon the spirit.
Measured against older and sterner standards, your resolve comes up wanting. The shame of it bites deep before the herald passes on.

encounterOptions.label: Hear The Echo Of Lost Wars
encounterOptions.description: Listen not only to the message, but to the grief, pride, and old resolve carried inside each formal word.

outcomes.resultText: Beneath the herald's measured speech you catch the surviving wisdom of elder wars. What he carries becomes more than news; it becomes insight.
The speech is fair and distant, and its deeper meaning slips from you like song in another tongue.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Turn aside from the royal message before it can bind you to its burden.

outcomes.resultText: You depart before the herald is finished, yet the unfinished summons follows you like a banner glimpsed through sea-mist.

cards.name: Hired Assassin
cards.description: An encounter with a silent killer can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The stranger did not seem accidental, and that alone was enough to make the meeting feel dangerous.

There was secrecy in the posture, history in the eyes, and the unsettling sense that this crossing of paths might be far more important than either road suggested.

What should they do now? Should they trust the wanderer, watch for what is concealed, or seize what advantage the moment offers?

encounterOptions.label: Break The Killer's Measure
encounterOptions.description: Turn before the assassin's plan reaches its perfect moment and force the encounter into open struggle.

outcomes.resultText: You wreck the assassin's clean design and seize hard profit from a death meant to be yours alone.
You survive, but not before the assassin's work leaves a painful signature on body and nerve.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Killing Line
encounterOptions.description: Trust speed, misdirection, and instinct to deny the assassin the angle already chosen for your death.

outcomes.resultText: You spoil the assassin's line of death at the last instant and vanish before a second opening can be made.
Though you escape the blade, the shock of that near-perfect attack tears all swiftness from your retreat.

encounterOptions.label: Bid Against The Blade
encounterOptions.description: Try bribery, menace, or dark usefulness and see whether the killer's purpose can be turned aside.

outcomes.resultText: The assassin finds enough value in your answer to stay the strike, and you are spared by calculation rather than mercy.
Nothing in your words outweighs the bargain already struck. Fear is all the assassin leaves you before striking again.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break the assassin's rhythm and run before patience and precision close again around you.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the hired killer, but the knowledge of how near death came leaves you rattled and slow.

cards.name: Hooded Figure
cards.description: An encounter with a hooded stranger can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The stranger did not seem accidental, and that alone was enough to make the meeting feel dangerous.

There was secrecy in the posture, history in the eyes, and the unsettling sense that this crossing of paths might be far more important than either road suggested.

What should they do now? Should they trust the wanderer, watch for what is concealed, or seize what advantage the moment offers?

encounterOptions.label: Address The Veiled Rider
encounterOptions.description: Risk speech before the hooded terror and see whether any answer comes back from within the shadow.

outcomes.resultText: Hooded Figure answers not with warmth but with recognition. The shadow withdraws a little from you, and that terrible acceptance carries its own grim advantage.
The figure says nothing, yet your heart begins to race as though some unseen hand had already found it.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Black Presence
encounterOptions.description: Look past hood, horse, and stillness for the deeper shape of the terror before you.

outcomes.resultText: At last you discern the law beneath the dread: not chaos, but a terrible will made patient, hunting, and precise. The understanding hardens you in dark knowledge.
The more you look, the less human the presence becomes. What little you learn is drowned beneath the fear it wakes in you.

encounterOptions.label: Profit From The Dread
encounterOptions.description: Try to turn the terror of the meeting into some immediate gain before it turns fully upon you.

outcomes.resultText: By grim nerve you take a practical gain from the passing dread, as though fear itself had paid tribute before riding on.
You reach too near the black terror before you, and the mere nearness of it leaves pain in body and soul alike.

fleeOption.label: Break From The Dread
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before the hooded shadow's full attention settles on you.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Hooded Figure behind, but the cold certainty of that presence follows you far beyond the place of meeting.

cards.name: Huorns
cards.description: An encounter with wrathful forest spirits can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The place and the meeting alike carried the feeling that ordinary rules had already thinned or slipped aside.

What stood before him was not easily measured, and the mind kept reaching for familiar explanations only to find that none of them quite held.

What should they do now? Should they press forward into the wonder, move carefully around the peril, or search for the meaning hidden inside the strangeness?

encounterOptions.label: Hack A Path Through Wrathwood
encounterOptions.description: Strike before trunks, branches, and roots can close together and make the very forest your prison.

outcomes.resultText: You carve a brutal path through the wrathwood and wrench grim advantage from a place that wanted only to swallow you.
The Huorns do not release you without bruising flesh and spirit alike beneath branch, root, and dread.

encounterOptions.label: Thread The Moving Timber
encounterOptions.description: Use silence and quick instinct to pass where the wood has not yet fully closed its secret paths.

outcomes.resultText: You move through the shifting wood just ahead of its anger and escape before the trees can join fully against you.
Though you escape their full grasp, the Huorns hold you long enough to break the pace of your flight.

encounterOptions.label: Call Into The Brooding Boughs
encounterOptions.description: Try words, strange woodcraft, or darker kinship against a will that may barely remember the use of speech.

outcomes.resultText: Something in your bearing or your darkness stills the Huorns' anger for a moment, and the living wood parts just enough to let you through.
The brooding trees heed nothing you say. Their answer is only tightening shadow and fear.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run before the forest fully decides to remember you as one more enemy beneath its branches.

outcomes.resultText: You break free of the Huorns at last, but the wood's slow wrath leaves you delayed and unnerved.

cards.name: I Am No Man
cards.description: An encounter with a shieldmaiden can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Steel, discipline, and hard-won purpose were plain in the bearing of the figure before him, even before a word had been exchanged.

This was not merely someone who had survived danger, but someone shaped by it so completely that every silence seemed part of a test.

What should they do now? Should they seek the warriors aid, prove courage in return, or study the harder truth beneath the strength?

encounterOptions.label: Honor The Hidden Valor
encounterOptions.description: Meet her with the respect due to a courage that has already outgrown every narrow judgment placed upon it.

outcomes.resultText: I Am No Man receives your honor without boast or softness. In that shared recognition of courage, hope rises clean and sharp as a battle-cry.
She gives you a hard, unreadable look, as if measuring whether you understand anything at all of the strength before you.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Unbroken Will
encounterOptions.description: Look past rank, grief, and peril until the fire beneath her defiance shows itself clearly.

outcomes.resultText: At last you see what moves her: not pride, but a fearless will that has chosen deed over despair. The revelation steels your mind and sharpens your purpose.
You feel the force in her, but not its shape. The encounter leaves you stirred and troubled, as though courage itself had rebuked you.

encounterOptions.label: Borrow Her Battle-Fortune
encounterOptions.description: Try to snatch some practical gain from the terrible momentum of her fearless hour.

outcomes.resultText: In the blaze of her resolve, fortune breaks your way for a moment, and you carry off a hard-won gain from the edge of battle-spirit.
You reach toward her moment with too much hunger, and its fierce nobility burns your grasp instead of enriching it.

fleeOption.label: Shrink From The Challenge
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before her defiance forces you to reckon with your own lesser heart.

outcomes.resultText: You leave I Am No Man behind, but the memory of that fearless challenge follows you and slows your step.

cards.name: King Of The Mark
cards.description: An encounter with a horse-lord can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Steel, discipline, and hard-won purpose were plain in the bearing of the figure before him, even before a word had been exchanged.

This was not merely someone who had survived danger, but someone shaped by it so completely that every silence seemed part of a test.

What should they do now? Should they seek the warriors aid, prove courage in return, or study the harder truth beneath the strength?

encounterOptions.label: Ride Under His Banner
encounterOptions.description: Ask the horse-lord king to lend speed, heart, and the favor of his war-host to your cause.

outcomes.resultText: King Of The Mark lifts his blade and calls your cause worthy. The very sound of the muster hardens your spirit, and you leave as though the wind of the Mark runs at your shoulder.
He judges you with a rider's blunt honesty and finds little to honor. You are not cast out, but you leave with the sting of having asked more than you were fit to receive.

encounterOptions.label: Meet The King's Charge
encounterOptions.description: Stand your ground before his warlike splendor and prove you have the heart to ride where he would ride.

outcomes.resultText: For a flashing instant it is as though you have ridden beside him into the storm of battle. King Of The Mark sees the steadiness in you and answers with the fierce respect reserved for the brave.
The fire in his eyes unmakes your boldness. Before that kingly war-spirit your strength falters, and the shame of it bites like a thrown spear.

encounterOptions.label: Hear The Hoofbeat Beneath The Silence
encounterOptions.description: Look past kingly splendor and read the grief, pride, and battle-readiness that move beneath his calm.

outcomes.resultText: You hear the deeper note beneath his command: a king burdened by loss yet still unbroken. The knowledge steadies you, sharp as a horn-call at dawn.
You catch only fragments of his mood, and the force of him leaves you more shaken than enlightened.

fleeOption.label: Rein Away
fleeOption.description: Break from the meeting before his mounted host and royal will can sweep you into their course.

outcomes.resultText: You turn aside before King Of The Mark can bind you to his purpose, yet the thunder of unseen hooves follows long after the road falls quiet.

cards.name: Kraken
cards.description: An encounter with a deep-sea terror can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Before they fully saw it, they felt the living danger of it: hunger, motion, and the sense that the ground itself had tilted toward tooth, sting, fang, or coil.

Whatever stood before him belonged more to instinct than mercy, and yet it carried its own dreadful kind of purpose.

What should they do now? Should they meet the creature by force, evade its reach, or try some desperate answer before it closes in?

encounterOptions.label: Strike The Deep Horror
encounterOptions.description: Attack through spray and writhing limbs before the creature can drag all around you down into its own dark element.

outcomes.resultText: Against the abyssal horror, you carve out impossible survival and drag hard reward back from the edge of the deeps.
Though you escape, the kraken leaves pain and oceanic dread clinging to you like cold brine.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Grasping Tide
encounterOptions.description: Use speed and perfect timing before the deep-born thing can close all its limbs around your last open path.

outcomes.resultText: You evade the kraken's full grip and pass beyond the worst of its reaching devastation.
The deep horror does not take you, but the chaos of escape leaves you heavily checked and shaken.

encounterOptions.label: Call Into The Abyss
encounterOptions.description: Attempt dark command, tribute, or impossible speech and see whether the thing from the deeps can be stayed at all.

outcomes.resultText: By dark power or unknown instinct, you win the briefest mercy from the abyssal thing and pass beyond its immediate wrath.
The abyss answers nothing you say. It offers only terror rising from below.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break away before the black water closes over every chance of escape.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Kraken, but only after the horror of the deeps has wrecked the order of your retreat.

cards.name: Lady Of The Woods
cards.description: An encounter with a lady of the woods can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Ask The Lady's Grace
encounterOptions.description: Bow your will and ask whether she will lay any blessing of light, speed, or foresight upon your road.

outcomes.resultText: Lady Of The Woods hears you in silence, and when she answers it is as though a clear light has passed through shadow. Hope rises in you like a hidden star remembered.
Her gaze passes through you like clear water over stone. She does not strike, yet you leave feeling every lesser motive in yourself too plainly seen.

encounterOptions.label: Stand In Her Light
encounterOptions.description: Remain before her without lowering your eyes and prove your heart can bear what the forest-queen reveals.

outcomes.resultText: For a breath she seems vast as memory and bright as doom deferred, yet you do not flinch. Lady Of The Woods receives your courage, and the grace of that endurance strengthens you.
The splendor of her presence strips away your confidence. Before such ancient power your strength fails, and the encounter leaves a wound no hand can bandage.

encounterOptions.label: Look Into The Mirror Of Leaves
encounterOptions.description: Study the waters, the roots, and the silence around her until some deeper meaning rises into view.

outcomes.resultText: In the stillness about Lady Of The Woods you glimpse a wisdom older than kingdoms and a power that chooses mercy over dominion. The vision lingers in you like a clear enchantment.
You seek revelation and instead find only the unsettling sense that she has measured you completely and found truths you dared not name.

fleeOption.label: Turn From The Golden Shade
fleeOption.description: Leave before her light, her beauty, or her judgment can take deeper hold of you.

outcomes.resultText: You withdraw from Lady Of The Woods, yet for many miles the memory of that light walks beside you like a question you were not brave enough to answer.

cards.name: Lamthanc
cards.description: An encounter with a northern dragon can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
By the time they realized the heat in the air was not the sun, the great shape had already claimed sky, stone, and courage alike.

Fire, treasure, and old malice all seemed near at hand, and every step felt as though it had brought him into the memory of some elder ruin.

What should they do now? Should they stand against the wyrm, slip clear of its wrath, or trust to words before the jaws close?

encounterOptions.label: Meet The Named Terror
encounterOptions.description: Throw your strength directly against Lamthanc before dread and momentum become wholly his.

outcomes.resultText: You break the force of Lamthanc's assault and wrench reward from a victory others would scarcely have dared attempt.
Though you survive, Lamthanc leaves behind wounds of fear and flesh to prove how narrow that survival was.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Killing Measure
encounterOptions.description: Trust timing and movement over force, and deny Lamthanc the clean moment of destruction it seeks.

outcomes.resultText: You evade Lamthanc's chosen strike and pass beyond the deadliest edge of the encounter before it can close fully.
You get free, but only after the pressure of the encounter has broken the pace of your retreat.

encounterOptions.label: Answer The Ancient Malice
encounterOptions.description: Attempt dark cunning, deference, or deception and see whether Lamthanc can be turned aside for a moment.

outcomes.resultText: Something in your answer satisfies Lamthanc's darker instinct, and the danger is stayed just long enough for you to pass.
Your words stir no mercy in Lamthanc, and fear settles over you as heavily as a sentence already given.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break away before Lamthanc's full weight closes and makes retreat impossible.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Lamthanc, but only after the strain of the encounter has left you slowed and deeply unsettled.

cards.name: Lobelia
cards.description: An encounter with a sharp-tongued matron can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Warm light, plain speech, and watchful eyes met him before any formal greeting did, and the place felt safer than the roads outside without ever becoming careless.

Here comfort and good sense lived side by side, and one had the feeling that much could be learned if approached the right way.

What should they do now? Should they accept the welcome, listen for what the household knows, or push the meeting too far?

encounterOptions.label: Accept Her Stiff Courtesy
encounterOptions.description: Take what welcome she offers, knowing it will come laced with judgment as well as tea and shelter.

outcomes.resultText: For all her edge, Lobelia proves no coward in the keeping of house and hearth. The shelter she gives is real, and it steadies you more than her manner suggests it should.
Her gaze never leaves you, and every courtesy lands like a veiled accusation. You leave the visit more strained than soothed.

encounterOptions.label: Hear The Sting In Her Speech
encounterOptions.description: Listen carefully, for grievance, suspicion, and sharp memory often hide the very thing worth knowing.

outcomes.resultText: Amid complaint and cutting recollection, Lobelia lets fall a truth sharp enough to be useful and solid enough to profit by.
You get only old grievances, sharpened names, and no scrap of real use. The time is lost to wounded pride and idle circling.

encounterOptions.label: Cross Words With Lobelia
encounterOptions.description: Push her temper and pride directly, and see whether anything but sharper trouble comes of it.

outcomes.resultText: Lobelia does not retreat; she hardens. The force of her contempt turns the whole meeting bitter and joyless.
She gives you not another useful word, only the shut door of affronted pride.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Leave her standing in her own dignity and spare yourself the clash of wills.

outcomes.resultText: You move on without entangling yourself in Lobelia's sharp company, though perhaps also without learning what fiercer strength lay hidden there.

cards.name: Lord Of The Woodlands
cards.description: An encounter with a woodland lord can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Ask Leave Of The Greenwood Throne
encounterOptions.description: Request passage, favor, or swift assistance from the woodland king before his patience wears thin.

outcomes.resultText: Lord Of The Woodlands grants your petition with cool authority. Hidden ways open, watchful eyes turn friendly, and the forest itself seems to speed your passing.
He gives you only the bare courtesy due a traveler, and the reserve in his voice warns you not to mistake restraint for welcome.

encounterOptions.label: Face The Woodland Crown
encounterOptions.description: Stand before his cold pride and prove you are not one more fool to be dismissed from his halls.

outcomes.resultText: You meet the keen pride of Lord Of The Woodlands without shrinking, and at last he acknowledges you with the hard-won respect of one ruler to another.
His disdain cuts cleaner than any blade. Under that lifted brow and measured scorn, your resolve buckles and leaves you marked by the encounter.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Leaf-Hidden Mind
