encounterOptions.description: Study his glances, the beasts around him, and the half-seen workings of the forest court for the truth beneath his reserve.

outcomes.resultText: At last you see beyond the hauteur: a ruler fierce in defense, suspicious by long necessity, and bound to his realm as tightly as root to stone. The knowledge sharpens your judgment.
The forest's silences and the king's reserve yield nothing cleanly. You leave tangled in doubts, as though every tree held back a different answer.

fleeOption.label: Slip The Forest Court
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before the king's leave must be won or denied.

outcomes.resultText: You depart before Lord Of The Woodlands can lay judgment on you, yet every shadowed branch behind you feels like a watchman taking note.

cards.name: Mage From The East
cards.description: An encounter with an eastern sage can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
At the edge of twilight they found a figure who seemed less like a traveler than a keeper of meanings half-hidden from ordinary folk.

The air around the meeting felt full of counsel, judgment, and the sense that what was spoken here might matter long afterward.

What should they do now? Should they ask for aid, prove worthy of deeper counsel, or watch for the lesson behind the silence?

encounterOptions.label: Break The Sigiled Guard
encounterOptions.description: Drive straight through staff, spell, and gathering menace before the eastern mage can fully bind the field.

outcomes.resultText: You smash through the storm of his warding art and force a path where none seemed open. What you carry away is not just survival, but a hard-won gain seized from the very teeth of sorcery.
The mage's power scorches your path and leaves its mark upon body and mind before you can break free.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Eastern Net
encounterOptions.description: Rely on timing, concealment, and quick wit to pass beyond the reach of his prepared design.

outcomes.resultText: You find the one thin opening in his woven design and vanish through it before his wrath can close. Even his magic cannot seize what it cannot quite catch.
Though you escape the worst of him, the mage tangles your retreat with vexing power and leaves you stumbling out of rhythm.

encounterOptions.label: Answer The Hidden Test
encounterOptions.description: Risk speech in the heart of danger and try to reach the purpose behind his threatening mask.

outcomes.resultText: Something in your words reaches the stern wisdom behind the menace. Mage From The East lowers the full weight of his power, and the peril passes like a judgment endured.
Your words find no bridge across the danger before you. The mage's gaze hardens, and the failure of speech chills the heart more deeply than silence.

fleeOption.label: Retreat From The Trial
fleeOption.description: Break away before the mage's challenge closes fully around you.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Mage From The East, but the retreat costs time and composure.

cards.name: Naval Raid
cards.description: An encounter with raiders from the sea can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The place and the meeting alike carried the feeling that ordinary rules had already thinned or slipped aside.

What stood before him was not easily measured, and the mind kept reaching for familiar explanations only to find that none of them quite held.

What should they do now? Should they press forward into the wonder, move carefully around the peril, or search for the meaning hidden inside the strangeness?

encounterOptions.label: Break The Boarding Rush
encounterOptions.description: Meet the raiders in the first violent crush before panic and momentum make the whole assault theirs.

outcomes.resultText: You smash the raiders' momentum and wrench hard profit from a sea-fight fought at arm's length and blade's width.
Even in survival, the raid leaves you bloodied and shaken by the speed of its violence.

encounterOptions.label: Slip Through Fire And Rigging
encounterOptions.description: Move through smoke, ropes, and broken command before the raiders can seal every route of escape.

outcomes.resultText: You pass through the chaos of the raid before the attackers can draw a sure bead on you or your course.
You escape the raiders, but the confusion of the assault breaks your pace and composure badly.

encounterOptions.label: Bargain Across The Rails
encounterOptions.description: Try ransom, threat, or darker familiarity and see whether the raiders can be turned from blood toward profit.

outcomes.resultText: The raiders hear enough profit or menace in your answer to let the encounter end without finishing the kill.
Your words vanish into smoke and greed, and fear takes hold as surely as any grappling hook.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break from the raid before fire, steel, and sea close every path at once.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Naval Raid, but only after its chaos has left your retreat delayed and rattled.

cards.name: Old Willow
cards.description: An encounter with an ancient tree-spirit can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The place and the meeting alike carried the feeling that ordinary rules had already thinned or slipped aside.

What stood before him was not easily measured, and the mind kept reaching for familiar explanations only to find that none of them quite held.

What should they do now? Should they press forward into the wonder, move carefully around the peril, or search for the meaning hidden inside the strangeness?

encounterOptions.label: Hack At The Heartwood
encounterOptions.description: Strike before root and branch can draw you wholly into the willow's slow, crushing malice.

outcomes.resultText: With desperate blows you tear free of the willow's grasp and wrench some gain from the very spite that sought to bury you.
Though you break loose, the willow's crushing hatred leaves hurt and dread tangled deep in you.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Root-Snare
encounterOptions.description: Move before drowsiness, water, and winding roots can drag you into the tree's hidden hold.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the willow's hidden snare at the last moment and pass beyond its reach before the roots can close.
The willow delays you with creeping roots and heavy drowse, and your escape comes slower than you dared allow.

encounterOptions.label: Murmur To The Ancient Spite
encounterOptions.description: Try song, cunning, or some darker sympathy and see whether the old tree can be turned aside for a breath.

outcomes.resultText: For reasons of old malice or stranger understanding, Old Willow loosens his hold and suffers you to pass.
Your words only sink into the willow's old hatred, and what rises back is fear as heavy as the riverbank mud.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Flee before root, branch, and sleep close around you as one living trap.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Old Willow, but only after his slow malice has robbed your retreat of pace and calm.

cards.name: Protector Of The Woods
cards.description: An encounter with a forest guardian can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Ask Shelter Of Root And Fur
encounterOptions.description: Call upon the protector to hide, hearten, or speed you beneath the living defense of the wood.

outcomes.resultText: Protector Of The Woods gives a curt sign, and the forest answers. Beast and branch turn kindly toward you, and the road ahead feels guarded by more than luck.
He does not strike, yet neither does he welcome you. The creatures nearest him keep their distance, and you leave with the uneasy sense that the woods would sooner close behind you than open ahead.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Beneath The Old Boughs
encounterOptions.description: Bear the stern weight of his wild guardianship and prove you do not come as a trespasser at heart.

outcomes.resultText: Protector Of The Woods studies you with the hard patience of the living wild, then accepts your courage. In that rough acknowledgment there is strength enough to steady even a hunted heart.
The old wild in him finds you wanting. Under that judgment your resolve falters, and the forest's refusal leaves pain behind it.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Woodland Warning
encounterOptions.description: Follow the tension in branch, hoof, and birdsong until the deeper meaning of his vigil begins to show.

outcomes.resultText: At last you understand that his roughness is only the bark around a deeper guardianship. In every creature's alarm and every root-held silence, you glimpse a wisdom that protects by refusing to sleep.
The wood's signs gather too thickly around you. Instead of insight, you carry away only a sharpened unease and the sense of being unwelcome beneath the leaves.

fleeOption.label: Leave The Forest To Itself
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before the protector and his woods decide more harshly what to make of you.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Protector Of The Woods behind, yet every branch above your road seems to bend with warning after you pass.

cards.name: Quick Beam
cards.description: An encounter with a hasty ent can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Call The Hasty Ent
encounterOptions.description: Ask the quick-hearted shepherd of trees to lend his sudden strength and living speed to your cause.

outcomes.resultText: Quick Beam answers before doubt can take root. The strength of living timber surges to your side, and your road gains the fierce quickness of a forest finally stirred.
He gives you only a hasty half-measure, as though your need had not kindled the deeper wrath or loyalty in him. You leave feeling hurried past, not helped.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Before The Living Ash
encounterOptions.description: Face his quick anger and prove you will not splinter beneath the first hard test.

outcomes.resultText: You do not flinch before Quick Beam's sudden force. He recognizes in you something worth moving quickly for, and his rough respect kindles your own courage.
His impatience crashes over you like a falling bough. Before that living force your strength gives way and leaves its bruise behind.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Hasty Wisdom
encounterOptions.description: Look past the speed and temper until the older roots of his judgment begin to show.

outcomes.resultText: At last you see that Quick Beam's haste is not emptiness but rooted feeling moving faster than most would dare. The realization sharpens you like wind through leaves.
You mistake his speed for shallowness and miss the depth beneath it. The encounter leaves you rattled and little wiser than before.

fleeOption.label: Step Aside From The Stride
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before his quick strength sweeps you into a course you are not ready to follow.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Quick Beam behind, but the force of his restless stride stays with you and slows your own uncertain pace.

cards.name: Riverside Host
cards.description: An encounter with a riverside company can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The place and the meeting alike carried the feeling that ordinary rules had already thinned or slipped aside.

What stood before him was not easily measured, and the mind kept reaching for familiar explanations only to find that none of them quite held.

What should they do now? Should they press forward into the wonder, move carefully around the peril, or search for the meaning hidden inside the strangeness?

encounterOptions.label: Take Shelter By The Water
encounterOptions.description: Accept the host's table and fire, and let the steadiness of river and roof restore you for a little while.

outcomes.resultText: The Riverside Host gives you a place by the water and the kind of quiet care that settles body and spirit together.
Though you are received beneath the riverside roof, no true ease finds you there, and you leave with your nerves still drawn tight.

encounterOptions.label: Hear What Floats Downstream
encounterOptions.description: Listen for the tidings that travel with ferrymen, barges, and wet-booted strangers.

outcomes.resultText: From weather-speech, ferry-talk, and a host's quiet memory, you gather a useful truth worth carrying onward.
The talk drifts like water around you and leaves nothing solid behind but lost time.

encounterOptions.label: Press The River-House Too Hard
encounterOptions.description: Push beyond courtesy and try to force from your host what would have been given more freely in trust.

outcomes.resultText: The warmth of the riverside house fades at once, and your manner leaves the whole meeting bitter and strained.
Your host gives you no more than bare civility, and any chance of useful speech is washed away.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Pass the river-house by and keep your journey unentangled by its welcome.

outcomes.resultText: You move on without stopping, though some quiet steadiness of the riverside is lost to you by that choice.

cards.name: Roac
cards.description: An encounter with a wise raven can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Ask The Raven's Tidings
encounterOptions.description: Appeal to Roac for warning, swift word, or the sharp little advantage that only a high-flying witness can grant.

outcomes.resultText: Roac answers with a cry and a tilt of black wings, and the warning he gives comes quick enough to turn misfortune aside before it strikes in full.
He gives you only a sliver of the truth, enough to trouble but not enough to save. You leave with unease perched on your shoulder like a second shadow.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Beneath The Black Eye
encounterOptions.description: Bear the weight of his old, unblinking judgment and prove you are worth his notice.

outcomes.resultText: Roac studies you with the stern patience of an old survivor and finds you not unworthy. The hard favor of that judgment steels your spirit.
The old raven's measure finds too much folly in you. Under that sharp regard, your strength falters and leaves a wound behind it.

encounterOptions.label: Hear The Crag-Wisdom
encounterOptions.description: Listen beyond his cries and silences until the old intelligence behind them begins to show.

outcomes.resultText: At last you hear what his harsh voice was carrying all along: old memory, swift warning, and the lore of those who watch the world from above it. The insight sharpens you like cold air.
His meanings come too sharply and too briefly for you to seize. You leave with only unease and the feeling of having missed a vital warning.

fleeOption.label: Turn From The Crag-Cry
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before Roac's warning can fasten more deeply upon your road.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Roac behind, but the memory of that knowing cry follows you far longer than you would like.

cards.name: Scatha
cards.description: An encounter with a cold-drake can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
By the time they realized the heat in the air was not the sun, the great shape had already claimed sky, stone, and courage alike.

Fire, treasure, and old malice all seemed near at hand, and every step felt as though it had brought him into the memory of some elder ruin.

What should they do now? Should they stand against the wyrm, slip clear of its wrath, or trust to words before the jaws close?

encounterOptions.label: Challenge The Winter-Worm
encounterOptions.description: Attack before Scatha's cold malice and draconic strength can lock the whole field beneath his dominion.

outcomes.resultText: You break through the winter-worm's terror and drag away wealth worthy of a deed the North would remember for generations.
Though you escape, Scatha's chill and violence leave a hurt that feels as though winter itself had bitten into you.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Frozen Vigil
encounterOptions.description: Move beyond the cold-drake's watch before his hoard-lust and wrath turn wholly upon your trail.

outcomes.resultText: You pass beyond Scatha's frozen vigilance before the worm can fix you fully in his murderous notice.
You escape the worm, but his winter-shadow leaves your retreat stiff, slow, and dread-laden.

encounterOptions.label: Tempt The Hoard-Heart
encounterOptions.description: Offer craft, tribute, or dark sympathy and see whether greed can buy what courage alone cannot.

outcomes.resultText: Scatha is stayed by greed or darker understanding, and for a narrow moment his winter malice does not fall on you.
Your words freeze unheard against the worm's cold pride, and fear settles over you like a northern night.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run before the winter-worm can turn your whole escape into one more frozen tale of folly.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Scatha, but the cold terror of that retreat leaves you halting and shaken.

cards.name: Sea Serpent
cards.description: An encounter with a sea serpent can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Before they fully saw it, they felt the living danger of it: hunger, motion, and the sense that the ground itself had tilted toward tooth, sting, fang, or coil.

Whatever stood before him belonged more to instinct than mercy, and yet it carried its own dreadful kind of purpose.

What should they do now? Should they meet the creature by force, evade its reach, or try some desperate answer before it closes in?

encounterOptions.label: Break The Coiling Wake
encounterOptions.description: Strike before the serpent's body and the sea around it become one continuous trap.

outcomes.resultText: You tear free of the sea-serpent's killing sweep and win harsh reward from the edge of drowning and fang.
Even in escape, the serpent leaves behind wounds and sea-born terror that cling like salt in the blood.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Salt Coil
encounterOptions.description: Move before wave, tail, and rising body can close the water around you beyond recovery.

outcomes.resultText: You evade the sea-serpent's full claim and pass beyond the worst of its rising coil just in time.
Though you escape, the heaving struggle with sea and serpent leaves your retreat ragged and slow.

encounterOptions.label: Call To The Deep Coil
encounterOptions.description: Try dark command, old sea-craft, or impossible nerve and see whether the serpent pauses its kill.

outcomes.resultText: By strange mastery or darker instinct, you win a narrow mercy from the sea-serpent and pass beyond its immediate wrath.
The sea-serpent heeds nothing you can offer, and fear rises as swiftly as the dark water around it.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break away before scale, sea, and panic all close around the same doomed moment.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Sea Serpent, but only after the struggle has left your retreat broken and shaking.

cards.name: Sea Storm
cards.description: An encounter with a perilous storm can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The place and the meeting alike carried the feeling that ordinary rules had already thinned or slipped aside.

What stood before him was not easily measured, and the mind kept reaching for familiar explanations only to find that none of them quite held.

What should they do now? Should they press forward into the wonder, move carefully around the peril, or search for the meaning hidden inside the strangeness?

encounterOptions.label: Ride The Black Water
encounterOptions.description: Meet the storm in raw defiance before wave and wind tear command entirely from your hands.

outcomes.resultText: You force your way through the storm's black violence and come out with gain won against sea and sky alike.
Even in survival, the storm batters fear and injury deep into you before it relents.

encounterOptions.label: Thread The Broken Swell
encounterOptions.description: Use nerve, instinct, and exact timing to slip where the storm has not yet fully closed its ruin.

outcomes.resultText: You catch the one narrow rhythm in the storm's chaos and pass through it before the sea can fully swallow your course.
You get clear of the worst, but the storm leaves your retreat badly slowed and disordered.

encounterOptions.label: Cry Against Wind And Deep
encounterOptions.description: Try prayer, dark command, or desperate sea-craft and see whether the storm can be checked for even a breath.

outcomes.resultText: For one narrow interval, the storm eases just enough under your dark or desperate appeal to let you pass.
The storm answers no voice you can raise, and fear fills every space where command had stood.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run before wave and wind together close the last open path.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Sea Storm, but only after its violence has shattered the order of your retreat.

cards.name: She Elf
cards.description: An encounter with an elven wanderer can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Ask The Evenstar's Grace
encounterOptions.description: Seek the healing favor, swift aid, or strengthening hope of the elven lady before you.

outcomes.resultText: She Elf answers with a grace as steady as starlight, and the weariness in you gives way to renewed hope and swifter purpose.
She offers courtesy without closeness, and when you leave it is with the ache of having stood near a healing you could not fully receive.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Before The Undying Choice
encounterOptions.description: Bear the clear strength in her gaze and prove that your own heart does not fail before devotion and fate.

outcomes.resultText: She Elf sees that your courage is not empty noise but something chosen and borne. In that recognition, your spirit rises like a banner answered in kind.
The steadfastness in her unmans you more than any open rebuke. Beside such clarity, your own strength falters and leaves you wounded.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Hidden Resolve
encounterOptions.description: Look beyond beauty and courtesy until the iron will beneath them comes into view.

outcomes.resultText: At last you see the deeper truth in her: not softness, but a resolve willing to endure loss, distance, and doom without surrendering love. The insight stays with you like clear light.
You mistake grace for fragility and leave having learned nothing but your own blindness. The failure weighs heavily on you.

fleeOption.label: Turn From The Evenstar
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before her grace and resolve force too much truth upon your heart.

outcomes.resultText: You leave She Elf behind, but the memory of that grave and faithful light slows your steps with longing.

cards.name: Shelob
cards.description: An encounter with a giant spider can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Before they fully saw it, they felt the living danger of it: hunger, motion, and the sense that the ground itself had tilted toward tooth, sting, fang, or coil.

Whatever stood before him belonged more to instinct than mercy, and yet it carried its own dreadful kind of purpose.

What should they do now? Should they meet the creature by force, evade its reach, or try some desperate answer before it closes in?

encounterOptions.label: Defy The Hunger In The Dark
encounterOptions.description: Strike before web, sting, and monstrous bulk can close your fate into one suffocating knot.

outcomes.resultText: Against one of the eldest hungers of Middle-earth, you carve a path to survival and seize reward worthy of dreadful legend.
Though you escape, Shelob's sting and suffocating dread leave wounds too deep for the body alone.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Web-Night
encounterOptions.description: Trust stealth and impossible timing before the web-maze, the sting, and the dark itself agree upon your doom.

outcomes.resultText: You pass through the edge of Shelob's hunger before her full malice can close around you in silk and venom.
You escape the worst of her snare, but the dark web-labyrinth leaves your retreat broken and slow.

encounterOptions.label: Whisper To The Ancient Hunger
encounterOptions.description: Try dark promise, kinship of evil, or sheer desperate cunning and see whether the old monster pauses the kill.

outcomes.resultText: Some dark instinct or older evil in you stays Shelob's hunger for a fleeting moment, and you pass outside her immediate claim.
Shelob hears no bargain worth more than your fear, and dread rises around you thicker than webbing.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break from the web-night before the ancient spider closes every way but downward into her hunger.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Shelob, but only after the horror of her dark domain has shattered all steadiness in your retreat.

cards.name: Silver Elf
cards.description: An encounter with an elven noble can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Ask The Silver Favor
encounterOptions.description: Request that the radiant elf-lord grant you some swift grace of woodcraft, rank, or elven protection.

outcomes.resultText: Silver Elf grants your request with a gesture bright and spare. The favor is given as though from a height above mortal need, yet it surrounds you with unmistakable elven grace.
He grants you only a distant courtesy, beautiful and cold. You leave feeling not helped, but quietly diminished beneath his brilliance.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Before The Silver Pride
encounterOptions.description: Bear his high and distant majesty without lowering yourself into shame or anger.

outcomes.resultText: Silver Elf studies you in gleaming silence, then at last inclines his head. It is a small gesture, yet it strikes with the force of a rare honor freely given.
The cool perfection of his bearing strips away your confidence. Under that silver regard, your strength thins and leaves you wounded in pride and flesh alike.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Bright Reserve
encounterOptions.description: Watch his expression, his poise, and the hidden edge beneath his beauty until the truth of him begins to show.

outcomes.resultText: You glimpse that Silver Elf's splendor is not vanity alone, but armor: beauty sharpened into distance, royalty turned into a wall. The understanding leaves you subtler than before.
You are drawn into the cold dazzle of him and come away with more awe than understanding, as though you had stared too long at polished moonlight.

fleeOption.label: Step Back From The Gleam
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before his beauty and pride can humble you any further.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Silver Elf behind, yet the memory of that cold brilliance lingers like a challenge you could not meet.

cards.name: Slyardach
cards.description: An encounter with a northern dragon can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
By the time they realized the heat in the air was not the sun, the great shape had already claimed sky, stone, and courage alike.

Fire, treasure, and old malice all seemed near at hand, and every step felt as though it had brought him into the memory of some elder ruin.

What should they do now? Should they stand against the wyrm, slip clear of its wrath, or trust to words before the jaws close?

encounterOptions.label: Meet The Old Dread Head-On
encounterOptions.description: Break into the heart of Slyardach's menace before fear and force turn the field wholly against you.

outcomes.resultText: You shatter Slyardach's momentum and seize reward from a victory won against a terror long thought beyond easy resistance.
Though you survive, Slyardach leaves deep proof behind that survival was no assured thing.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Feared Shape
encounterOptions.description: Use timing and nerve to deny Slyardach the one clear opening it seeks to destroy you.

outcomes.resultText: You evade Slyardach's surest chance and pass beyond the deadliest reach of the encounter before it can close again.
You escape the worst of Slyardach, but the strain of it breaks your retreat into a slower, shakier thing.

encounterOptions.label: Parley With The Feared Name
encounterOptions.description: Attempt dark courtesy, deception, or service and see whether the menace can be bent aside for a heartbeat.

outcomes.resultText: Something in your answer stays Slyardach's hand or hunger, and you win a narrow passage where none should have been offered.
Your words gain nothing but the certainty that fear is now the truest thing standing between you.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run before Slyardach's full weight settles and turns retreat into slaughter.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Slyardach, but only after the pressure of that terror has left you delayed and shaken.

cards.name: Smaug Ahunt
cards.description: An encounter with a hunting dragon can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
By the time they realized the heat in the air was not the sun, the great shape had already claimed sky, stone, and courage alike.

Fire, treasure, and old malice all seemed near at hand, and every step felt as though it had brought him into the memory of some elder ruin.

What should they do now? Should they stand against the wyrm, slip clear of its wrath, or trust to words before the jaws close?

encounterOptions.label: Meet The Dragon In Flight
encounterOptions.description: Face Smaug while he is still all wrathful movement, before his hunt can become a slaughter.

outcomes.resultText: You survive the hunting dragon's fury and wrench a prize from the very path of airborne ruin.
You escape the hunt, but not before Smaug's fire and terror leave deep and blazing scars.

encounterOptions.label: Slip Beneath The Hunting Shadow
encounterOptions.description: Hide, dart, and time your movement perfectly before the great worm's ranging eye fixes on you.

outcomes.resultText: You pass beneath Smaug's hunting shadow before his fury can settle on you as chosen prey.
Though you evade destruction, the hunt drives you hard and leaves your retreat badly broken.

encounterOptions.label: Cry Tribute To The Hunter
encounterOptions.description: Risk words, tribute, or dark cunning and see whether the great worm will turn aside from the kill.

outcomes.resultText: Smaug is amused, tempted, or momentarily satisfied, and the hunt turns elsewhere instead of falling on you.
Nothing in your words outweighs the dragon's joy in pursuit. Fear comes first, and flame is close behind.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run before the hunting dragon circles back and chooses you beyond doubt.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Smaug's hunt, but only after panic and fire have wrecked the order of your retreat.

cards.name: Smaug At Home
cards.description: An encounter with a sleeping dragon can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
By the time they realized the heat in the air was not the sun, the great shape had already claimed sky, stone, and courage alike.

Fire, treasure, and old malice all seemed near at hand, and every step felt as though it had brought him into the memory of some elder ruin.

What should they do now? Should they stand against the wyrm, slip clear of its wrath, or trust to words before the jaws close?

encounterOptions.label: Dare The Hoard-Lord
encounterOptions.description: Attack Smaug in the seat of his own pride before lair, flame, and treasure close around you as one doom.

outcomes.resultText: Against impossible odds, you survive the hoard-lord's wrath and take a reward worthy of dragon-risk.
Though you tear yourself free, Smaug's lair leaves you burned by terror, greed, and flame alike.

encounterOptions.label: Ghost Across The Treasure-Halls
encounterOptions.description: Move with impossible care across gold, shadow, and sleeping peril before one misplaced sound wakes doom.

outcomes.resultText: You cross the dragon's hall without giving the hoard-lord a clean moment to rise fully against you.
You escape the lair, but only after tension and near-disaster have drained the speed from every step.

encounterOptions.label: Speak To The Dragon On Gold
encounterOptions.description: Attempt flattery, riddling caution, or dark tribute and see whether pride can buy you a few more breaths.

outcomes.resultText: Smaug is pleased enough by your tone, tribute, or darkness to let the encounter pass without immediate ruin.
The dragon hears only weakness or insolence, and the fear of that judgment nearly breaks you before fire ever falls.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before the hoard-lord's full waking wrath turns the whole hall against you.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Smaug's hall, but not before the strain of it leaves you slowed and shaken.

cards.name: Smaug Riddle
cards.description: An encounter with a cunning dragon can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
By the time they realized the heat in the air was not the sun, the great shape had already claimed sky, stone, and courage alike.

Fire, treasure, and old malice all seemed near at hand, and every step felt as though it had brought him into the memory of some elder ruin.

What should they do now? Should they stand against the wyrm, slip clear of its wrath, or trust to words before the jaws close?

encounterOptions.label: Break The Riddle With Steel
encounterOptions.description: Shatter the game before dragon-wit and mounting dread leave you helpless in your own silence.

outcomes.resultText: You tear the exchange apart before Smaug can master it fully, and seize hard advantage from a moment meant to undo you.
You escape, but not before dragon-fire and dragon-scorn have marked you deeply.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Net Of Questions
encounterOptions.description: Withdraw before your answers betray too much and the dragon's cunning turns certainty into doom.

outcomes.resultText: You evade the worst of Smaug's questioning and withdraw before his clever malice can pin you fast.
Though you escape the trap of words, the strain of it leaves your retreat slow and trembling.

encounterOptions.label: Answer Fire With Riddle
encounterOptions.description: Match cunning against draconic pride and see whether concealed truth, flattery, or darkness can turn the exchange.

outcomes.resultText: Smaug is intrigued or flattered enough to let the contest end without immediate ruin, and you leave with breath still in you.
The dragon sees through you or grows bored of restraint, and fear surges up before the conversation can become anything but doom.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break from the exchange before one more word gives the dragon everything he needs.

outcomes.resultText: You escape Smaug's deadly conversation, but only after dread has robbed your retreat of steadiness.

cards.name: Smeagol
cards.description: An encounter with a furtive wanderer can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The stranger did not seem accidental, and that alone was enough to make the meeting feel dangerous.

There was secrecy in the posture, history in the eyes, and the unsettling sense that this crossing of paths might be far more important than either road suggested.

What should they do now? Should they trust the wanderer, watch for what is concealed, or seize what advantage the moment offers?

encounterOptions.label: Speak Gently To The Wretch
encounterOptions.description: Set aside revulsion for a moment and address him in a voice soft enough not to drive him at once into fear or spite.

outcomes.resultText: Smeagol's eyes stop darting for a single heartbeat, and some rag of old gentleness stirs in him. The meeting does not turn foul, and that alone feels like a mercy.
He cringes and mutters to himself, never yielding trust enough to let you near the truth of him.

encounterOptions.label: Search The Ruin Within
encounterOptions.description: Look past the crouching creature and try to discern what ancient wound, craving, or spell still rules him.

outcomes.resultText: In his muttering, his fear, and his desperate possessiveness, you glimpse the shape of an older corruption. The knowledge is bitter, but it sharpens the mind.
The sight of what he has become clings to you like cold marsh-water, and you turn away before understanding brings any comfort.

encounterOptions.label: Bargain With Hunger
encounterOptions.description: Exploit his need, his fear, or his furtive greed and see whether anything useful can be drawn from so broken a creature.

outcomes.resultText: With a quick word and a quicker instinct, you coax some small gain from Smeagol before suspicion overcomes him and he vanishes.
He twists away with a hiss and leaves you scratched by more than nails. What you reached for turns suddenly against you.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Back away from the creeping figure before pity, revulsion, or greed can draw you further in.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Smeagol to the shadows, yet the memory of him lingers like an unanswered riddle in the dark.

cards.name: Soldier Of Gil Galad
cards.description: An encounter with an elven warrior can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Ask For The Strength Of Lindon
encounterOptions.description: Call on the disciplined mercy of an elder warrior and ask whether his strength may be lent to your road.

outcomes.resultText: The soldier answers without flourish, but not without honor. Aid comes to you like a shield lifted into place and a marching-song remembered at the right hour.
His gaze passes over you and finds no bond between your cause and his duty. You leave with no comfort, only the chill of having been judged and set aside.

encounterOptions.label: Hold The Line Before Him
encounterOptions.description: Meet his war-tempered scrutiny as though already standing in the last rank before a coming assault.

outcomes.resultText: He sees that you would not break easily in battle, and the respect he grants is as clean and hard as forged steel.
Against the measure of elder wars, your strength proves thin. The rebuke is silent, but it lands like a spear-shaft across the chest.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Discipline Of The Elder Host
encounterOptions.description: Study his gear, his posture, and the habits of a soldier shaped by the long fight against the Shadow.

outcomes.resultText: In the soldier's stillness you discern more than readiness: you read endurance, order, and old battlefield wisdom honed over ages.
You see the armor but miss the lesson within it, and the chance to learn from elder discipline slips away barren.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Turn aside before his measured silence can become a judgment upon you.

outcomes.resultText: You leave the soldier behind, though the sense of being weighed by older standards follows for a while after.

cards.name: Spawn Of Ungoliant
cards.description: An encounter with a giant spider can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Before they fully saw it, they felt the living danger of it: hunger, motion, and the sense that the ground itself had tilted toward tooth, sting, fang, or coil.

Whatever stood before him belonged more to instinct than mercy, and yet it carried its own dreadful kind of purpose.

What should they do now? Should they meet the creature by force, evade its reach, or try some desperate answer before it closes in?

encounterOptions.label: Cut Through The Brood-Night
encounterOptions.description: Strike before silk, fang, and old darkness can join into one suffocating doom.

outcomes.resultText: You carve through the brood-spawn's terrible hunger and wrench reward from a horror born to devour rather than yield.
Though you survive, the spawn's venom and darkness leave fear and pain tangled deep within you.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Web-Hunger
encounterOptions.description: Move before web, darkness, and fanged intent can close every path but death.

outcomes.resultText: You evade the brood-spawn's surest snare and pass beyond the worst of its darkness by a breath.
You get away, but the choking dark and near-caught webbing leave your retreat ragged and slow.

encounterOptions.label: Whisper To The Brood Of Night
encounterOptions.description: Try dark promise, foul mastery, or desperate cunning and see whether the ancient hunger pauses the kill.

outcomes.resultText: By dark instinct or darker allegiance, you win the briefest stay from the spider-spawn's hunger and pass outside its first claim.
The spawn knows no bargain worth more than your fear, and terror thickens around you like webbing.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break from the brood-dark before web and hunger close around you for good.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Spawn Of Ungoliant, but only after its ancient darkness has ruined the order of your retreat.

cards.name: Spell Weaver Of Rivendell
cards.description: An encounter with an elven sage can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
At the edge of twilight they found a figure who seemed less like a traveler than a keeper of meanings half-hidden from ordinary folk.

The air around the meeting felt full of counsel, judgment, and the sense that what was spoken here might matter long afterward.

What should they do now? Should they ask for aid, prove worthy of deeper counsel, or watch for the lesson behind the silence?

encounterOptions.label: Ask The Hidden Weaving
encounterOptions.description: Seek some portion of Rivendell's subtle craft to speed, shield, or steady your road.

outcomes.resultText: Spell Weaver Of Rivendell answers with a craft too fine for rough eyes to follow. When the weaving settles, your spirit is stronger and your way made swifter.
You receive only the outer courtesy of the house and none of its deeper art. When you leave, the beauty of what was withheld weighs on you more than any comfort offered.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Within The House Of Memory
encounterOptions.description: Hold yourself steady before the subtle arts and ancient dignity of Rivendell.

outcomes.resultText: You endure the measured grace of Rivendell without shrinking. The Spell Weaver recognizes a spirit not wholly unworthy of its deeper arts, and that regard strengthens you.
The ancient calm around the weaver reveals every flaw in your bearing. Before such refined power, your strength falters and leaves its wound behind.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Silent Threads
encounterOptions.description: Study the house, the light, and the workings beneath the visible calm until the deeper spell-work begins to show.

outcomes.resultText: At last you glimpse the hidden threads of Rivendell's power: memory, healing, and wisdom woven so closely that no single strand can be named apart. The sight leaves you keen and inwardly steadied.
You see only beauty and miss the deeper weaving beneath it. The encounter leaves you more awed than enlightened, and a little ashamed of the failure.

fleeOption.label: Leave The Weaving Unread
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before the subtle arts of Rivendell draw you into more truth than you can bear.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Spell Weaver Of Rivendell behind, but the sense of hidden songs and half-seen workings lingers and slows your road.

cards.name: Spy Birds
cards.description: An encounter with watchful birds can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Before they fully saw it, they felt the living danger of it: hunger, motion, and the sense that the ground itself had tilted toward tooth, sting, fang, or coil.

Whatever stood before him belonged more to instinct than mercy, and yet it carried its own dreadful kind of purpose.

What should they do now? Should they meet the creature by force, evade its reach, or try some desperate answer before it closes in?

encounterOptions.label: Scatter The Black Watchers
encounterOptions.description: Strike before the sky-borne spies can cry your passage onward to waiting danger.

outcomes.resultText: You break the flock's watch and wrench useful gain from the panic of wings and broken signals.
Though you drive them off, the flock still marks you with fear before the last wings scatter.

encounterOptions.label: Pass Beneath Their Seeing
encounterOptions.description: Use cover, timing, and silence to move before the wheeling watchers can fix your full trail.

outcomes.resultText: You vanish beneath the spy-birds' broken sightline and pass on before their warning can fully take shape.
You escape their full notice, but the need for concealment costs you precious speed.

encounterOptions.label: Cry To The Mastering Flock
encounterOptions.description: Use darker command or cunning and see whether the birds can be turned, stilled, or sent elsewhere.

outcomes.resultText: The flock turns under your darker claim, and their watching passes on without fastening fully upon you.
The birds heed no master you can become, and fear rises with each circling cry overhead.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run before every wing above you becomes one more warning carried ahead.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the spy-birds, but only after concealment and panic have left your retreat slowed and frayed.

cards.name: Storm Crow
cards.description: An encounter with a ragged wanderer can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The stranger did not seem accidental, and that alone was enough to make the meeting feel dangerous.

There was secrecy in the posture, history in the eyes, and the unsettling sense that this crossing of paths might be far more important than either road suggested.

What should they do now? Should they trust the wanderer, watch for what is concealed, or seize what advantage the moment offers?

encounterOptions.label: Withstand The Troubling Fury
encounterOptions.description: Match the force of the ragged wanderer's will before his intervention overturns your course completely.

outcomes.resultText: You weather the full force of the Storm Crow's intervention and wrench hard advantage from the upheaval he brings.
Though you force your way free of the meeting, his words and power leave you shaken to the marrow.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Wanderer's Net
encounterOptions.description: Move before counsel becomes command and before his unsettling attention fixes wholly upon you.

outcomes.resultText: You pass through the storm of his coming before he can fully turn his troublesome purpose upon you.
You escape the worst of the encounter, but the disruption of it leaves your momentum badly broken.

encounterOptions.label: Answer The Ragged Counsel
encounterOptions.description: Risk words with the crow-grey wanderer and see whether wit, humility, or darker sympathy can bend the meeting your way.

outcomes.resultText: The Storm Crow accepts your answer, and though the meeting remains stern, it releases you with wind at your back rather than wrath in your bones.
Your answer fails to turn him, and the encounter darkens into dread rather than wisdom.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Leave before his storm of warnings and demands can break more in you than you mean to yield.

outcomes.resultText: You pull away from the Storm Crow at last, but the force of that departure leaves you slowed and inwardly shaken.

cards.name: Strider
cards.description: An encounter with a lone ranger can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The stranger did not seem accidental, and that alone was enough to make the meeting feel dangerous.

There was secrecy in the posture, history in the eyes, and the unsettling sense that this crossing of paths might be far more important than either road suggested.

What should they do now? Should they trust the wanderer, watch for what is concealed, or seize what advantage the moment offers?

encounterOptions.label: Ask The Ranger's Guide
encounterOptions.description: Place your need in the hands of the road-wise wanderer and ask for his hard-earned guidance.

outcomes.resultText: Strider answers without flourish, but his aid comes sure and timely. Paths open, danger seems less blind, and your road gains the strength of hidden kingship in plain clothes.
He gives only a few curt words and a look that weighs more than it comforts. You leave with the feeling that help was near, but not yet yours to claim.

encounterOptions.label: Stand The Ranger's Measure
encounterOptions.description: Hold yourself steady beneath his rough scrutiny and prove you can bear the road as he has borne it.

outcomes.resultText: Strider studies you in a long, weathered silence, then at last accepts you as one who might keep step beside him. His respect is plain, hard, and worth more than praise.
His eye finds the weakness in you with ranger precision. Under that quiet judgment your strength fails and leaves its mark behind.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Hidden Heir
encounterOptions.description: Look past the travel-stains, guarded tone, and ranger craft until the deeper lineage in him begins to show.

outcomes.resultText: At last you glimpse the greater shape within the wanderer: not merely a ranger, but a king long hidden in hardship and restraint. The insight steadies and sharpens you at once.
You see only the ragged cloak and wary road-mind, missing the greater truth beneath. The failure leaves you uneasy and dimly ashamed.

fleeOption.label: Take The Other Track
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before the ranger's hidden purpose binds your road to his.

outcomes.resultText: You leave Strider behind, but the memory of that weathered strength stays with you like a road you should perhaps have chosen.

cards.name: The Avari
cards.description: An encounter with a wild elf can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.

What should they do now? Should they seek aid, prove worthy before that regard, or listen for the wisdom hidden beneath the calm?

encounterOptions.label: Hail The Unbidden Elder
encounterOptions.description: Offer greeting without presumption to the ancient elf who never walked the roads of the West.

outcomes.resultText: The Avari answers your greeting with wary courtesy, and for a moment the old estrangement between your paths grows less sharp.
He gives you no word you can trust, and the old remoteness in him leaves you smaller than before.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Eastern Memory
encounterOptions.description: Study the scars, silence, and strange bearing of the ancient elf until some hidden lore reveals itself.

outcomes.resultText: At last you glimpse a fragment of an older elven memory, one untouched by the bright certainties of western song. The knowledge is strange, but keen.
The oldness in him proves too alien to read, and the meeting leaves you with only a sharper sense of how little you truly understand.

encounterOptions.label: Take What The East Forgot
encounterOptions.description: Try to come away from the meeting with some hard little prize of knowledge, wealth, or opportunity.

outcomes.resultText: By wit or fortune you carry off a small gain from the meeting, like a coin found in a ruin no one else remembered to search.
You reach too greedily toward what the ancient elf would leave buried, and the old sharpness in him cuts back at once.

fleeOption.label: Leave The Stranger Unnamed
fleeOption.description: Turn away before the old and unreadable one chooses to reveal more than you can bear.

outcomes.resultText: You leave The Avari behind, but the sense of some lost eastern history lingers like an unfinished tale at the edge of thought.

cards.name: The Deeps Dweller
cards.description: An encounter with a thing from the depths can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The place and the meeting alike carried the feeling that ordinary rules had already thinned or slipped aside.

What stood before him was not easily measured, and the mind kept reaching for familiar explanations only to find that none of them quite held.

What should they do now? Should they press forward into the wonder, move carefully around the peril, or search for the meaning hidden inside the strangeness?

encounterOptions.label: Strike Into The Black Below
encounterOptions.description: Attack before the hidden thing beneath can make your footing, breath, and courage all belong to it instead of you.

outcomes.resultText: You force a path through the deeps-dweller's hidden terror and seize harsh reward from beneath the edge of disaster.
Though you get away, the thing from below leaves dread and pain clinging to you like cold depth-water.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Under-Reach
encounterOptions.description: Move before the hidden dweller below can close all unseen ways of escape around you.

outcomes.resultText: You pass beyond the deeps-dweller's surest reach before it can drag the whole encounter down into darkness.
You escape the worst of it, but the strain of that hidden pursuit leaves your retreat halting and disordered.

encounterOptions.label: Call To The Buried Hunger
encounterOptions.description: Attempt dark command, old under-lore, or desperate cunning and see whether the thing below can be stayed at all.

outcomes.resultText: By some darker instinct or buried kinship, the deeps-dweller lets you pass without claiming more from the encounter.
The hidden dweller hears nothing you say, and fear rises from below as if the dark itself had found a voice.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Break away before the thing below decides the whole world above should sink into its reach.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Deeps Dweller, but only after the hidden horror of it has broken the pace of your retreat.

cards.name: The Goblin Basher
cards.description: An encounter with a grim hunter can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Steel, discipline, and hard-won purpose were plain in the bearing of the figure before him, even before a word had been exchanged.

This was not merely someone who had survived danger, but someone shaped by it so completely that every silence seemed part of a test.

What should they do now? Should they seek the warriors aid, prove courage in return, or study the harder truth beneath the strength?

encounterOptions.label: Call For The Bear's Strength
encounterOptions.description: Ask the goblin-hater to lend his brute might and terrible protection to your need.

outcomes.resultText: The Goblin Basher answers with a rumbling growl and a blow strong enough to change the shape of the road ahead. With that savage aid behind you, fear loses some of its hold.
He sniffs the wind around you, finds something not to his liking, and turns away with a warning snarl that chills even the bold.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Before The Roar
encounterOptions.description: Hold your ground while the beast's rage towers over you and prove you are made of sterner stuff than prey.

outcomes.resultText: You do not flinch when The Goblin Basher rises to his full terror. Something in that unbroken stance pleases him, and his fierce regard leaves you burning with battle-spirit.
You stand a heartbeat too long beneath his wrath. The blow does not fall cleanly, but the nearness of it leaves pain enough to remember.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Wild Temper
encounterOptions.description: Watch the beast, the wind, and the signs of old anger upon him until the law of his fury becomes clearer.

outcomes.resultText: You come to see that The Goblin Basher is not mere rage, but wrath with a purpose and memory. In that realization there is a harsh wisdom you can carry away.
You misread the signs and linger too close to danger. The lesson you take from the meeting is sharp, breathless, and edged with fear.

fleeOption.label: Back Away From The Den
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before his temper breaks fully over you.

outcomes.resultText: You retreat from The Goblin Basher without provoking the full storm, but your steps remain hurried long after his roar fades into the mountains.

cards.name: The Lonely Wanderer
cards.description: An encounter with a lonely wanderer can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The stranger did not seem accidental, and that alone was enough to make the meeting feel dangerous.

There was secrecy in the posture, history in the eyes, and the unsettling sense that this crossing of paths might be far more important than either road suggested.

What should they do now? Should they trust the wanderer, watch for what is concealed, or seize what advantage the moment offers?

encounterOptions.label: Answer The Wood-Call
encounterOptions.description: Step into the hush with open hands and trust that the wanderer and his watching creatures will know your heart.

outcomes.resultText: The Lonely Wanderer raises his staff, and the wild stills around you. Birds settle, small lives draw near, and for a moment the whole wood seems to shelter your path.
He gives you only a searching look, and the creatures nearest him shrink away from your presence. You depart with the warning denied and your spirit made heavier.

encounterOptions.label: Read Leaf And Feather
encounterOptions.description: Follow the bent grass, the broken song of birds, and every restless movement around him until the wood begins to speak.

outcomes.resultText: In the rush of wings and the trembling of leaves, The Lonely Wanderer lets you glimpse the shape of danger before it closes. What seemed like noise becomes warning, and warning becomes insight.
Too many signs crowd in at once. Every cry sounds urgent, every shadow looks meaningful, and you come away burdened with dread instead of wisdom.

encounterOptions.label: Pluck Fortune From The Thicket
encounterOptions.description: Press the strange meeting for some secret, token, or advantage before the wanderer slips back into green shadow.

outcomes.resultText: Before The Lonely Wanderer vanishes among root and briar, you win a small but precious boon from the moment and carry it away like treasure found under leaves.
The wild recoils from your grasping heart. Branch and thorn, startled wing and racing foot turn against you, and the forest punishes your impatience.

fleeOption.label: Shun The Omen
fleeOption.description: Turn from the wanderer and leave the whispering wood before its warning can fasten upon you.

outcomes.resultText: You hurry from the meeting and do not look back, yet all along the road you feel as though some living warning beat its wings just beyond your sight.

cards.name: The Necromancer
cards.description: An encounter with a dark sorcerer can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
A chill of command walked before the figure, and by the time they stood face to face with it the world already felt narrower, harsher, and less forgiving.

Here was power shaped by fear, discipline, and long intention, the sort that rarely offers anything without claiming something in return.

What should they do now? Should they confront the menace outright, evade the will pressing upon him, or answer in the language of rank, threat, or shadow?

encounterOptions.label: Strike At The Gathering Shadow
encounterOptions.description: Throw all strength forward before the dread around the Necromancer can crush will, flesh, and hope together.

outcomes.resultText: Against reason and terror alike, you force a path through the gathering shadow and seize a prize fit for such impossible peril.
Even in survival, the Necromancer brands you with pain and dread that linger like a curse.

encounterOptions.label: Pass Beneath The Lidless Dread
encounterOptions.description: Trust secrecy and perfect timing to slip the Necromancer's attention before it fixes fully upon your soul.

outcomes.resultText: By nerve and shadow alone, you pass beyond the Necromancer's direct grasp before his terrible will can settle upon you.
Though you escape his full regard, the dread of it weighs on you like chains and ruins your pace.

encounterOptions.label: Address The Veiled Power
encounterOptions.description: Speak in craft, submission, or dark allegiance and see whether the shadowed master finds reason to let you pass.

outcomes.resultText: Some fragment of your speech or service is judged worth sparing, and the Necromancer lets you go beneath a shadow no sane heart could welcome.
Your words mean nothing to the veiled power before you. What remains is only crushing fear.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run while there is still enough of your own will left to command your legs.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Necromancer's immediate reach, but only after terror has broken the order of your retreat.

cards.name: The Ruling Steward
cards.description: An encounter with a stern ruler can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Steel, discipline, and hard-won purpose were plain in the bearing of the figure before him, even before a word had been exchanged.

This was not merely someone who had survived danger, but someone shaped by it so completely that every silence seemed part of a test.

What should they do now? Should they seek the warriors aid, prove courage in return, or study the harder truth beneath the strength?

encounterOptions.label: Lay Your Cause Before The Chair
encounterOptions.description: Speak plainly beneath his scrutiny and ask for aid in the name of the realm.

outcomes.resultText: The Ruling Steward hears your cause to the end, then answers with grim resolve. His command rings out through the hall, and you leave strengthened by the weight of Gondor behind you.
He listens without warmth, and when your plea is spent he dismisses it with a few cutting words. You depart with your courage thinned beneath his judgment.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Before The Steward
encounterOptions.description: Meet his hard regard without bowing and prove that your will does not break in noble halls.

outcomes.resultText: For one hard moment the hall becomes a battlefield of wills, and The Ruling Steward finds you unshaken. His respect is sparing, but it falls on you like the gift of a banner before war.
His gaze strips the strength from your defiance. Before the silence of the hall and the weight of his displeasure, your boldness falters and leaves its mark upon you.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Black Thought
encounterOptions.description: Watch his eyes, his silences, and the strain beneath his lordly composure until the deeper trouble shows itself.

outcomes.resultText: You glimpse the darkness gnawing beneath the splendor: not cowardice, but a mind overburdened by long despair. The knowledge leaves you wary, but sharper than before.
You look too deeply and come away carrying a shadow of his burden. The hall seems dimmer when you leave, and your thoughts are troubled with foreboding.

fleeOption.label: Withdraw From The Hall
fleeOption.description: Take your leave before his judgment closes fully upon you.

outcomes.resultText: You depart the presence of The Ruling Steward with no chains upon you, yet the stern weight of that meeting follows like a stone carried in the heart.

cards.name: The Serpent Slayer
cards.description: An encounter with a scarred dragon-slayer can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
Steel, discipline, and hard-won purpose were plain in the bearing of the figure before him, even before a word had been exchanged.

This was not merely someone who had survived danger, but someone shaped by it so completely that every silence seemed part of a test.

What should they do now? Should they seek the warriors aid, prove courage in return, or study the harder truth beneath the strength?

encounterOptions.label: Ask The Burned King For Aid
encounterOptions.description: Seek the strength and ruthless swiftness of the dragon-slayer before his patience gives way to contempt.

outcomes.resultText: The Serpent Slayer grants aid like a king who has already outlived dragon-fire. What he gives is not gentle, but sharp, swift, and terrible enough to cut open a road through danger.
He gives only a scarred and distant courtesy, as though your need were too small to trouble one who has looked into dragon-fire and remained standing.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Before The Dragon-Burned
encounterOptions.description: Face his burned pride and prove you are not made small by scars, majesty, or wrath.

outcomes.resultText: You stand firm before the dragon-burned king and do not blanch. The Serpent Slayer answers with a fierce respect that feels half like honor and half like challenge.
The ruined fire in him proves too much for you. Under that scarred and terrible gaze, your strength fails and leaves its wound behind.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Ashen Crown
encounterOptions.description: Look past the scars, the pride, and the beauty warped by flame until the deeper truth of him begins to show.

outcomes.resultText: At last you see beyond rage and splendor: a lord made harder, not hollow, by dragon-fire. The insight is bitter, but it sharpens your mind at once.
You look for wisdom and find only the sting of old flame reflected in him. The encounter leaves you troubled and no wiser than before.

fleeOption.label: Withdraw From The Burned Majesty
fleeOption.description: Leave before the scarred king's wrath or contempt can fall more heavily upon you.

outcomes.resultText: You leave The Serpent Slayer behind, yet the memory of that dragon-marked pride follows you like heat after flame.

cards.name: The Shard Eyed King
cards.description: An encounter with a fallen king can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
A chill of command walked before the figure, and by the time they stood face to face with it the world already felt narrower, harsher, and less forgiving.

Here was power shaped by fear, discipline, and long intention, the sort that rarely offers anything without claiming something in return.

What should they do now? Should they confront the menace outright, evade the will pressing upon him, or answer in the language of rank, threat, or shadow?

encounterOptions.label: Break The Splintered Crown
encounterOptions.description: Strike before the Nazgul king's authority and sharpened dread can fasten over the field.

outcomes.resultText: You shatter the deadly poise of the Shard Eyed King and seize reward from a clash steeped in crown-born terror.
Though you escape, the king's shard-bright gaze leaves wounds of fear and flesh that do not easily mend.

encounterOptions.label: Slip The Glass-Cut Gaze
encounterOptions.description: Move before the Nazgul king can pin you beneath that cold, splintering attention and close the trap.

outcomes.resultText: You evade the Shard Eyed King's full regard and pass beyond the tightest circle of his danger.
You escape the king's grasp, but the dread of that near-encounter leaves your retreat badly broken.

encounterOptions.label: Address The Crown Of Dread
encounterOptions.description: Risk dark courtesy, rank, or secret usefulness and see whether the Nazgul lord grants you a narrow dispensation.

outcomes.resultText: The Shard Eyed King hears enough darkness or service in your answer to spare you for the moment and let you go under his cold judgment.
Your words glance off Akhorahil's dead sovereignty, and what remains is fear honed like a shard.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Run before the king of dread draws the whole encounter into the iron certainty of his will.

outcomes.resultText: You escape the Shard Eyed King, but only after his cold dominion has slowed and unsettled every step of your retreat.

cards.name: The Shipwright
cards.description: An encounter with a master shipwright can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The place and the meeting alike carried the feeling that ordinary rules had already thinned or slipped aside.

What stood before him was not easily measured, and the mind kept reaching for familiar explanations only to find that none of them quite held.

What should they do now? Should they press forward into the wonder, move carefully around the peril, or search for the meaning hidden inside the strangeness?

encounterOptions.label: Ask Passage Of The Havens
encounterOptions.description: Seek the shipwright's favor, that he might grant swiftness, safe making, or some grace carried on the sea-wind.

outcomes.resultText: The Shipwright listens as though measuring your need against all long partings. At length he grants his aid, and the calm skill of the Havens steadies your road.
He offers only a grave courtesy and a few spare words, as if your need were too slight for the deeper gifts that lie within his keeping.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Upon The Grey Shore
encounterOptions.description: Show that your spirit can endure the old sorrow and stern peace that cling to the Havens.

outcomes.resultText: You stand steady beneath the sea-wind and the weight of ancient memory. The Shipwright marks the strength in you and answers with a grave respect that heartens the soul.
The age in his eyes is too much for you to bear. Before that calm, ancient sorrow your strength gives way, and the meeting leaves you diminished.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Grain Of Memory
encounterOptions.description: Watch his hands, his harbor, and the old stillness around him until the deeper truth of the Havens begins to show.

outcomes.resultText: In the rhythm of hand on timber and tide on shore, you glimpse a wisdom shaped by loss, endurance, and far horizons. The understanding settles into you like a clear tide.
You try to read the silence of the Havens and instead come away burdened by a homesickness for somewhere you have never seen.

fleeOption.label: Turn From The Grey Havens
fleeOption.description: Leave before the stillness of the sea and the shipwright's memory can work more deeply on you.

outcomes.resultText: You depart The Shipwright and the sea-road behind him, yet for a long while every wind feels filled with farewells you were not meant to hear.

cards.name: The Star Gazer
cards.description: An encounter with a star-reader can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
At the edge of twilight they found a figure who seemed less like a traveler than a keeper of meanings half-hidden from ordinary folk.

The air around the meeting felt full of counsel, judgment, and the sense that what was spoken here might matter long afterward.

What should they do now? Should they ask for aid, prove worthy of deeper counsel, or watch for the lesson behind the silence?

encounterOptions.label: Ask The Stars To Speak
encounterOptions.description: Request that the star-wise wanderer turn his far sight toward your need and draw some guidance down from the heavens.

outcomes.resultText: The Star Gazer lifts his gaze, and for a breath it seems the heavens themselves bend nearer. What he grants you is not mere comfort, but direction touched with wonder and haste.
He gives you a few quiet words and nothing more. They are beautiful, but too distant for your grasp, and you depart with unease rather than clarity.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Beneath The Turning Sky
encounterOptions.description: Endure the weight of his far-seeing silence and prove your heart can bear truths larger than itself.

outcomes.resultText: You do not shrink when the vastness above seems to open around you. The Star Gazer sees that steadiness and answers with a rare respect that leaves your spirit stronger.
The immensities behind his gaze are too much for you. You stagger back from the nearness of that vision, hurt by truths you were not ready to bear.

encounterOptions.label: Trace The Celestial Thread
encounterOptions.description: Follow the wheeling signs he studies until some hidden line of meaning reveals itself to you.

outcomes.resultText: At last the wandering lights gather into a pattern you can almost understand. Through The Star Gazer's silence you touch a wisdom vast, patient, and strangely merciful.
You chase meanings across the heavens until all the night seems to spin above you. When the vision breaks, only dread remains.

fleeOption.label: Turn From The Open Night
fleeOption.description: Leave before the stars and the seer's silence draw you too far from the ordinary world.

outcomes.resultText: You leave The Star Gazer behind, but the heavens seem larger and stranger above you, and your road slows beneath their weight.

cards.name: The Swan Herder Of Umbar
cards.description: An encounter with a southern mariner can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The stranger did not seem accidental, and that alone was enough to make the meeting feel dangerous.

There was secrecy in the posture, history in the eyes, and the unsettling sense that this crossing of paths might be far more important than either road suggested.

What should they do now? Should they trust the wanderer, watch for what is concealed, or seize what advantage the moment offers?

encounterOptions.label: Ask Favor Of The Swan-Prowed Lord
encounterOptions.description: Appeal to his sea-bred nobility and ask whether grace, speed, or goodwill may yet be granted to your road.

outcomes.resultText: The Swan Herder answers with measured grace, and for a little while your path carries both renewed spirit and swifter fortune.
You are not wholly refused, yet the kindness offered is too slight to quiet the unease left by the meeting.

encounterOptions.label: Stand Before The Sea-Court
encounterOptions.description: Let him measure your bearing as one who belongs among proud harbors, polished steel, and dangerous loyalties.

outcomes.resultText: You do not diminish beneath his regal sea-bred scrutiny, and the respect he grants steadies you like a favorable tide.
Measured against his poise and command, your bearing falters, and the sting of it cuts more deeply than you expected.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Tide Beneath His Grace
encounterOptions.description: Study not only the elegance he shows, but the political current, danger, and memory moving beneath it.

outcomes.resultText: You discern the deeper current beneath his grace: old pride, perilous wisdom, and the skill of surviving where beauty and danger share one harbor.
The poise of the swan-herder remains unreadable to you, and the chance to grasp the deeper tide of the meeting slips away.

fleeOption.label: Flee
fleeOption.description: Withdraw before sea-grace and southern peril bind you more deeply than you intended.

outcomes.resultText: You move on before the swan-herder can claim more of your attention, though the memory of that sea-lit dignity lingers behind.

cards.name: The White Messenger
cards.description: An encounter with a white-robed messenger can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
A chill of command walked before the figure, and by the time they stood face to face with it the world already felt narrower, harsher, and less forgiving.

Here was power shaped by fear, discipline, and long intention, the sort that rarely offers anything without claiming something in return.

What should they do now? Should they confront the menace outright, evade the will pressing upon him, or answer in the language of rank, threat, or shadow?

encounterOptions.label: Kneel For Counsel
encounterOptions.description: Lower your guard and receive the white-robed stranger as one whose words may alter the fate of realms.

outcomes.resultText: The White Messenger raises his staff and speaks as though doom itself has already been weighed. His terrible certainty enters your heart like iron, and for a time no fear can master you.
He gives you splendid words, polished and commanding, but when the last syllable fades you cannot tell whether you have been guided or quietly bound.

encounterOptions.label: Contest His Will
encounterOptions.description: Match pride against pride and force the meeting into a trial of authority, daring him to yield even a finger's breadth.

outcomes.resultText: Against all expectation, The White Messenger yields a narrow concession. You leave the parley with spoils in hand and the thrill of having bent a mighty will.
He crushes your challenge beneath a gaze cold as winter stone, and your defiance withers into a wound far deeper than bruised flesh.

encounterOptions.label: Read The Hidden Voice
encounterOptions.description: Study his eyes, his servants, and the silence between each measured phrase until the truth beneath the courtesy begins to stir.

outcomes.resultText: At last you hear the harder voice beneath the noble one: not counsel, but command waiting to be obeyed. The revelation steels you against sorcery and smooth deceit alike.
You follow his meaning down twisting paths of courtesy and half-truth until all that remains is unease, as though you have stood too near the mouth of a deep design.

fleeOption.label: Break The Parley
fleeOption.description: Cut the audience short and deny him the chance to wrap your road in his voice.

outcomes.resultText: You tear yourself away before the parley can close around you, yet The White Messenger's final look follows like a sentence deferred to a darker hour.

cards.name: Treebeard
cards.description: An encounter with an ancient ent can be investigated.
cards.historyText:
The meeting came in a place where light, leaf, and stillness seemed to have agreed on some older order long before he arrived.

Whoever stood before him belonged to that order with effortless grace, and the feeling of being weighed, tested, or quietly measured was impossible to ignore.
